Genesis1:1 Shawng ningpawt e Karai Kasang gaw sumsing lamu hte ginding aga hpe hpan da wu ai.
Genesis1:2 Ginding aga chyawm gaw akrin ayang re ai hte asan awan rai nga ai; nsin mung sung ai shara e sin up nga ai rai nna
Genesis1:3 Shaloi Karai Kasang gaw
Genesis1:4 Dai ahtoi kaja nga ai gaw Karai Kasang mu wu ai: shaloi Karai Kasang gaw ahtoi hte nsin hpe karan jahka wu ai.
Genesis1:5 Karai Kasang gaw dai ahtoi hpe
Genesis1:6 Bai Karai Kasang gaw
Genesis1:7 Shaloi Karai Kasang gaw dai lamu madin a kata e nga ai hka hte lamu madin ntsa e nga ai hka hpe karan da wu ai: dai mung shing rai nga ai.
Genesis1:8 Karai Kasang gaw dai lamu madin hpe
Genesis1:9 Bai Karai Kasang gaw
Genesis1:10 Karai Kasang gaw dai hkarang hpe
Genesis1:11 Shaloi Karai Kasang gaw
Genesis1:12 Shaloi dai aga gaw
Genesis1:13 Shaloi shana hte jahpawt gaw masum ya nhtoi hta tai ma ai.
Genesis1:14 Bai Karai Kasang gaw
Genesis1:15 ginding aga ntsa e htoi ya nga na matu
Genesis1:16 Shing rai Karai Kasang gaw
Genesis1:17 Shagan ni hpe mung shi galaw wu ai. Ga ntsa e htoi ya nga na matu mung
Genesis1:18 Karai Kasang gaw dai ni hpe sumsing lamu a madin hta e tawn da wu ai: dai kaja nga ai gaw Karai Kasang mu wu ai.
Genesis1:19 Shaloi shana hte jahpawt gaw mali ya nhtoi hta tai ma ai.
Genesis1:20 Bai Karai Kasang gaw
Genesis1:21 Shaloi Karai Kasang gaw
Genesis1:22 Bai Karai Kasang gaw
Genesis1:23 Shaloi shana hte jahpawt gaw manga ya nhtoi hta tai ma ai.
Genesis1:24 Bai Karai Kasang gaw
Genesis1:25 Shing rai Karai Kasang gaw
Genesis1:26 Bai Karai Kasang gaw
Genesis1:27 Shing rai Karai Kasang gaw shi a hkrang sumla hte maren
Genesis1:28 Shaloi Karai Kasang gaw shan hpe tsun mu ai gaw
Genesis1:29 Bai Karai kasang gaw
Genesis1:30 dai hta kaga
Genesis1:31 Shaloi Karai Kasang gaw shi hpan hpajang da ai amu yawng mayawng hpe yu yu nna
Genesis2:1 Shing rai sumsing lamu hte ginding aga gaw
Genesis2:2 Karai Kasang gaw sanit ya nhtoi hta e shi galaw ai amu magam hpe shangut wu ai: shi galaw nu ai amu mahkra ngut masai rai nna
Genesis2:3 Dai rai nna Karai Kasang gaw dai sanit ya nhtoi hpe shaman wu ai hte dai hpe shachyoi shapra wu ai: kaning rai nme law
Genesis2:4 Ndai hte gaw
Genesis2:5 Ginding aga ntsa na ga nhprang hta anaw anam matut langai mi muk garai n tu ai
Genesis2:6 Rai timung ga na saiwan rawt nna aga ntsa ting hpe madit nga ai.
Genesis2:7 Shaloi Yehowa Karai Kasang gaw aga hta na ga yun hte shinggyim hkrang shachyaw wu ai rai nna
Genesis2:8 Dai hpang Yehowa Karai Kasang gaw
Genesis2:9 Ya Yehowa Karai Kasang gaw yu chyoi ai hte sha na matu mai kaja ai hpun amyu myu hpe
Genesis2:10 Dai sun hpe madit na matu mung Edin kaw nna hka nu langai mi lwi pru wa ai; dai hka nu gaw dai kaw na bra nna hka gai mali tai wa ai.
Genesis2:11 Langai ngu na hka gai a mying gaw Pishun rai nga ai: dai gaw ja rawng ai Hawila mung grup rai lwi kawan mat wa ai:
Genesis2:12 dai mung na ja gaw ja kaja rai nga ai: dai yang e badelim hpun naw hte unuk lungseng mung
Genesis2:13 Lahkawng ngu na hka gai a amying gaw Gihun rai nga ai: dai gaw Hkusha mung grup rai lwi kawan mat wa ai.
Genesis2:14 Masum ngu na hka gai a amying gaw Hidekela rai nga ai: dai gaw Asuri mung sinpraw maga de lwi mat wa ai. Mali ngu na hka gai a amying gaw Uhprat rai nga ai.
Genesis2:15 Shaloi Yehowa Karai Kasang gaw dai masha hpe woi la nna
Genesis2:16 Yehowa Karai Kasang dai masha hpe
Genesis2:17 rai timung kaja ai hte n kaja ai hpe chye ginhka shangun ai hpun hta na chyawm gaw
Genesis2:18 Bai Yehowa Karai Kasang gaw
Genesis2:19 Shaloi Yehowa Karai Kasang gaw nam mali na ashu ashan mahkra hpe mung
Genesis2:20 Shaloi dai masha wa yamnga mahkra hpe mung
Genesis2:21 Dai majaw Yehowa Karai Kasang gaw dai masha wa hpe yup kaba hte shayup wu ai rai nna
Genesis2:22 Shing rai
Genesis2:23 Shaloi dai masha wa gaw
Genesis2:24 Dai re ai majaw lasha gaw tinang a kanu kawa hpe kau da nhtawm shi a madu jan hte manoi nga na rai nna
Genesis2:25 Ya dai masha yan la gaw singgu krin nga ma ai rai timung
Genesis3:1 Ya dai lapu gaw
Genesis3:2 Shaloi dai numsha gaw
Genesis3:3 rai timung
Genesis3:4 Dai rai nna lapu gaw

Genesis3:6 Hpun dai gaw sha na matu mai kaja ai mung
Genesis3:7 Dai Shaloi shan a myi hpaw malu ai rai nna

Genesis3:9 Shaloi Yehowa Karai Kasang gaw Adam hpe
Genesis3:10 Shi gaw
Genesis3:11 Shaloi Yehowa Karai Kasang gaw
Genesis3:12 Dai rai nna Adam gaw
Genesis3:13 Shaloi Yehowa Karai Kasang gaw

Genesis3:15 nang hte numsha hpe mung
Genesis3:16 Numsha hpe mung
Genesis3:17 Adam hpe mung
Genesis3:18 aju hte atsing mung na a matu shi shatut na ra ai; ga na nsi naisi namlaw namlap nang sha nga lu na ndai:
Genesis3:19 ga de na nang hpe shapraw la de ai majaw
Genesis3:20 Shaloi Adam gaw shi a madu jan hpe
Genesis3:21 Yehowa Karai Kasang mung Adam hte shi a madu jan a matu shanhpyi hpun palawng galaw nna shan hpe shabu jahpun mu ai.

Genesis3:23 dai masha wa gaw
Genesis3:24 Shing rai dai masha wa hpe shi shapraw kau dat nna
Genesis4:1 Dai hpang Adam gaw shi a madu jan Ewa hte kanawn nna
Genesis4:2 Bai kanau Abela hpe bai shangai wu ai. Abela chyawm gaw sagu rem sha ai wa rai nga ai; Ka-in gaw yi hkauna galaw sha ai wa rai nga ai.
Genesis4:3 Ya aten du ai shaloi Ka-in gaw Yehowa hpe hkungga jaw na matu
Genesis4:4 Abela mung
Genesis4:5 Ka-in hte shi a hkungga hpe chyawm gaw shi sawn ya wu ai n rai. Dai rai nna Ka-in gaw ja ja pawt bu ai hte myi man sum nga lu ai.
Genesis4:6 Dai majaw Yehowa gaw Ka-in hpe
Genesis4:7 Nang kaja ai galaw yang gaw
Genesis4:8 Dai hpang Ka-in gaw shi a kanau Abela hte shaga nga ai; lang mi na shan gaw pa hkan e nga ma ai shaloi
Genesis4:9 Dai rai nna Yehowa gaw
Genesis4:10 Shaloi Yehowa gaw
Genesis4:11 Dai rai nna na a lata na nnau wa a asai hpe hkap la na
Genesis4:12 dai majaw aga hta nang galaw sha ai shaloi
Genesis4:13 Dai majaw Ka-in gaw
Genesis4:14 Yu u
Genesis4:15 Shaloi Yehowa gaw
Genesis4:16 Shaloi Ka-in gaw Yehowa a myi man kaw na pru mat wa nna Edin mung sinpraw maga na Noda mung hta nga nga ai.
Genesis4:17 Bai Ka-in gaw shi a madu jan hte kanawn nna
Genesis4:18 Ya Enuk gaw kasha Irad hpe shaprat wu ai; Irad gaw Mahuyala hpe shaprat wu ai; Mahuyala gaw Mahtushaela hpe shaprat wu ai; Mahtushaela gaw Lamek hpe shaprat wu ai.
Genesis4:19 Lamek chyawm gaw num lahkawng la wu ai; langai mi a amying gaw Ada
Genesis4:20 Ada gaw Yabala hpe shangai wu ai: dai wa gaw janghpang sum hta nga nna
Genesis4:21 Shi kanau a mying gaw Yubala rai lu ai: dai wa gaw tingse hte sumpyi chye dum ai ni mahkra a kawa rai nga ni.
Genesis4:22 Zila mahtang gaw Htubala Ka-in hpe shangai wu ai: dai wa gaw
Genesis4:23 Htubala Ka-in kajan gaw Nama rai lu ai. Ya Lamek gaw shi a madu jan yan hpe
Genesis4:24 Ka-in hpe shut ai wa
Genesis4:25 Ya Adam gaw shi a madu jan hte bai kanawn wu yang
Genesis4:26 Shet mung shadang sha langai mi lu wu ai rai nna
Genesis5:1 Ya ndai gaw Adam a labau lasang ni a lam rai nga ai. Karai Kasang gaw shinggyim masha hpe hpan tawn da ai nhtoi hta shi Karai Kasang a hkrang sumla hte maren shi hpe galaw wu ai; lasha hte numsha hpe hpan da wu ai.
Genesis5:2 Dai yan hpe shi shaman ya nna
Genesis5:3 Adam gaw latsa e sumshi ning rai sayang
Genesis5:4 Dai wa hpe Shet ngu nna shamying wu ai. Shet hpe shaprat wu ai hpang
Genesis5:5 Dai ra nna Adam hkrung nga ai nhtoi mahkra hte gaw
Genesis5:6 Shet gaw latsa e manga ning du jang
Genesis5:7 Enusha hpe shaprat wu ai hpang
Genesis5:8 Shet a nhtoi mahkra hte gaw jahku tsa e shi lahkawng ning rai lu ai: shaloi shi si mat ai.
Genesis5:9 Enusha gaw jahku shi ning du jang
Genesis5:10 Kenan hpe shaprat wu ai hpang
Genesis5:11 Enusha a nhtoi mahkra hte gaw jahku tsa e manga ning rai lu ai: shaloi shi si mat ai.
Genesis5:12 Kenan gaw sanit shi ning du jang Mahalela hpe shaprat wu ai.
Genesis5:13 Mahalela hpe shaprat wu ai hpang Kenan gaw matsat tsa e mali shi ning naw hkrung nga nna shadang sha hte shayi sha hpe shaprat da wu ai.
Genesis5:14 kenan a nhtoi mahkra hte gaw jahku tsa e shi ning rai lu ai: shaloi shi si mat ai.
Genesis5:15 Mahalela gaw kru shi manga ning du jang
Genesis5:16 Yared hpe shaprat wu ai hpang
Genesis5:17 Mahalela a nhtoi Mahkra hte gaw
Genesis5:18 Yared gaw latsa e kru shi lahkawng ning du jang
Genesis5:19 Enuk hpe shaprat wu ai hpang Yared gaw matsat tsa ning naw hkrung nga nna
Genesis5:20 Yared a nhtoi mahkra hte gaw Jahku tsa e kru shi lahkawng ning rai lu ai: shaloi shi si mat ai.
Genesis5:21 Enuk gaw kru shi manga ning du jang Mahtusala hpe shaprat wu ai.
Genesis5:22 Mahtusala hpe shaprat wu ai hpang
Genesis5:23 Enuk a nhtoi mahkra hte gaw masum tsa e kru shi manga ning rai lu ai:
Genesis5:24 Enuk chyawm gaw Karai Kasang hte rau hkawm sa nga ai rai nna
Genesis5:25 Mahtusala gaw latsa e matsat shi sanit ning du jang Lamek hpe shaprat wu ai.
Genesis5:26 Lamek hpe shaprat wu ai hpang Mahtusala gaw sanit tsa e matsat shi lahkawng ning naw hkrung nga nna shadang sha hte shayi sha hte hpe shaprat da wu ai.
Genesis5:27 Mahtusala a nhtoi mahkra hte gaw jahku tsa e kru shi jahku ning rai lu ai: shaloi shi si mat ai.
Genesis5:28 Lamek gaw latsa e matsat shi lahkawng ning du jang
Genesis5:29 
Genesis5:30 Noa hpe shaprat wu ai hpang Lamek gaw manga tsa e jahku shi manga ning naw hkrung nga nna
Genesis5:31 Lamek a nhtoi mahkra hte gaw sanit tsa e sanit shi sanit ning rai lu ai: shaloi shi si mat ai.
Genesis5:32 Ya Noa a asak gaw manga tsa ning rai nga ai: shaloi Noa gaw Shem

Genesis8:1 Shaloi Karai Kasang gaw Noa hte shi hte rau sanghpaw li hta rawng ai ashu ashan mahkra hte yamnga yawng hpe dum wu ai: dai majaw Karai Kasang gaw ga ntsa e nbung shabung dat wu ai rai nna

Genesis8:7

Genesis23:1 Ya Sara a prat gaw latsa hkun sanit ning rai salu ai; Sara hkrung nga ai gaw dai hte ning rai nga ai. Shaloi Sara gaw Hkanan mung na Kiryat Arba ngu ai Hebron mare hta si mat ai: Abraham mung Sara a majaw sharung shayawt ai hte hkrap ngu hkrap ngoi na nga sa wa ai.

Genesis38:29 Rai timung dai lata shi bai dawm la ai shaloi
Genesis38:30 Dai hpang lata hta sumri hkyeng hkawn ai kanau wa pru wa ai: shi a amying Zerak rai lu ai.
Genesis39:1 Shaloi Yawsep hpe Egutu mung de woi hkrat wa mu ai; dai de shi hpe woi hkrat wa ai Ishmaela masha ni a lata na
Genesis39:2 Yehowa chyawm gaw Yawsep hte rau nga nga ai rai nna
Genesis39:3 Yehowa shi hte rau nga ai rai nna
Genesis39:4 Yawsep mung shi a man e myi man pa ai rai nna
Genesis39:5 Shing rai
Genesis39:6 Shi lu malu mahkra gaw Yawsep a lata hta ap da nu ai rai nna
Genesis39:7 Dai hpang shi madu a madu jan gaw Yawsep hpe ra nna
Genesis39:8 Yawsep chyawm gaw n hkraw ai hte shi madu a madu jan hpe
Genesis39:9 ndai nta e ngai hta grau kaba ai kadai mung n nga ai; nang hta kaga hpa mung ngai hpe hkum ai n rai; nang gaw shi a madu jan she rai ndai: dai rai nna dai n hkru ai amu kaba hte Karai Kasang a man e ngai kaning rai shut hpyit lu na rai ta? ngu nna tsun wu ai.
Genesis39:10 Shani shagu dai num e shing ngu wu timung
Genesis39:11 Lani mi na gaw nta nhku de amu galaw na nga Yawsep shang wa ai rai nna
Genesis39:12 dai numsha gaw
Genesis39:13 Shing rai shi a lata hta hpun palawng kau da nna shinggan de hprawng mat wa ai hpe shi mu wu yang
Genesis39:14 shi a nta na lasha ni hpe shi shaga nna
Genesis39:15 ngai a ja ja jahtau dat yang she shi a palawng ngai ka kau da nna shinggan de hprawng pru mat wa sai
Genesis39:16 Shi madu wa du wa hkra
Genesis39:17 Madu wa du wa jang shi gaw
Genesis39:18 ngai a ja ja wa jahtau dat yang she
Genesis39:19 Na a mayam ngai hpe ning di nngai
Genesis39:20 Yawsep hpe rim la nhtawm
Genesis39:21 Rai timung Yehowa gaw shi hte rau nga ai rai nna
Genesis39:22 Dai rai nna htawng agyi wa gaw sharen da ai bawng ni yawng hpe Yawsep a lata de ap da wu ai rai nna
Genesis39:23 Yehowa gaw Yawsep hte rau nga ai rai nna
Genesis40:1 Dai lam ni byin ai hpang Egutu hkawhkam kaw tsabyi jau ai wa hte muk kabaw ai wa gaw
Genesis40:2 Dai majaw Hpara-u gaw

Genesis40:5 Shaloi htawng e bawng dung nga ai
Genesis40:6 Jahpawt e Yawsep gaw shan kaw shang nna shan hpe yu wu yang

Genesis40:8 Shan gaw
Genesis40:9 Shaloi tsabyi jau agyi wa shi a yup mang Yawsep hpe hkai dan wu ai gaw
Genesis40:10 dai tsabyi ru hta lakung masum kung nga ai; dai lakung ni hta apu majawm ai hte pu pu ma ai; tsabyi si sumbaw ni mung myin nga ma ai.

Genesis40:13 ya masum ya rai jang

Genesis46:1 Shaloi Israela gaw shi lu malu mahkra hte htawt sa wa nna
Genesis46:2 Karai Kasang mung shana e shingran hta Israela hpe shaga nna
Genesis46:3 Bai Karai Kasang gaw
Genesis46:4 ngai nang hte rau Egutu mung de yu wa na nngai; dai kaw na ngai nang hpe bai woi lung wa na de ai: Yawsep mung shi a lata na a myit hta mara ya lu na rin dai
Genesis46:5 Shaloi Yaku gaw Berasheba kaw na rawt ai rai nna
Genesis46:6 Hkanan mung e shanhte lu ai yamnga ni hte sutgan rai ni hpe mung la nna Egutu mung de sa wa ma ai:
Genesis46:7 shing rai Yaku gaw shi hkum hte shi a shayi shadang sha ni ngu ai
Genesis46:8 Da ndai gaw Egutu mung de du ai Israela a kashu kasha ni a amying rai malu ai; Yaku hte shi a shadang sha ni gaw: - Yaku a kasha alat Rubin rai nga ai.
Genesis46:9 Rubin a shadang sha ni gaw
Genesis46:10 Simun a shadang sha ni gaw
Genesis46:11 Lewi a shadang sha ni gaw
Genesis46:12 Yuda a shadang sha ni gaw
Genesis46:13 Yisahka shadang sha ni gaw Htola
Genesis46:14 Zebulun a shadang sha ni gaw
Genesis46:15 Ndai hte gaw Hpadan Aram e Yaku a matu shaprat ai
Genesis46:16 Gad a shadang sha ni gaw
Genesis46:17 Ashe a shadang sha ni gaw
Genesis46:18 Ndai hte gaw Laban shi a shayi sha Lea hpe jaw ai Zilhpa a shadang sha ni rai ma ai: Yaku a matu shi shaprat ai masha yawng marai shi kru rai ma ai.
Genesis46:19 Yaku a num dun Rahkela hta na shadan sha gaw Yawsep yan Ben-yamin rai ma ai.
Genesis46:20 Egutu mung e Ona mare a hkinjawng Hpoti-hpera a shayi sha Asenat hta na Yawsep a matu shaprat ai shadang sha gaw
Genesis46:21 Ben-yamin a shadang sha ni gaw
Genesis46:22 Ndai hte gaw Yaku a matu Rahkela hta na prat ai shadang sha ni rai ma ai: masha yawng marai shi mali rai ma ai.
Genesis46:23 Dan a shadang sha gaw Hushim rai nga ai.
Genesis46:24 Naphtali a shadang sha ni gaw
Genesis46:25 Ndai hte gaw Laban shi a shayi sha Rahkela hpe jaw ai Bila hta na Yaku a matu shaprat ai shadang sha ni rai ma ai: masha yawng marai sanit rai ma ai.
Genesis46:26 Yaku a kanam ni hpe n shalawm yang
Genesis46:27 Egutu mung e Yawsep lu ai shadang sha lahkawng nga ma ai: dai rai nna Egutu mung de du ai Yaku a amyu matu yawng gaw
Genesis46:28 Goshen mung de shi hpe lam sa madun ru ga nga
Genesis46:29 Dai rai nna Yawsep gaw shi a leng byau la nna
Genesis46:30 Shaloi Israela gaw
Genesis46:31 Bai Yawsep gaw shi a kahpu kanau ni hte she a kawa a nta masha ni hpe
Genesis46:32 dai ni gaw sagu rem ni rai nga ma ai: dai rai nna shanhte a sagu bainam hpung ni hpe mung

Genesis47:4 Bai shanhte gaw

Exodus7:25 Yehowa dai hka hpe kayat ari jaw ai hpang sanit ya lai hkra rai nga ai.

Exodus16:1 Dai hpang shanhte gaw Elim na htawt sa wa ma ai rai nna Israela kashu kasha shawa hpung ting

Exodus16:3 Shanhte gaw
Exodus16:4 Dai rai nna Yehowa gaw Mawshe hpe
Exodus16:5 Kru ya nhtoi hta gaw shani shagu hta la ai hta
Exodus16:6 Shaloi Mawshe yan Arun gaw
Exodus16:7 hpawt de mung Yehowa a hpung shingkang nanhte mu na marin dai: Yehowa hpe nanhte a put ai ga gaw shi na nu ai: an hpe aput na gaw an hpa hkaw ai yan rai ga ta?” ngu nna Israela kashu kasha ni hpe tsun mu ai.
Exodus16:8 Bai Mawshe gaw
Exodus16:9 Bai Mawshe gaw
Exodus16:10 Dai hte maren Arun mung Israela kashu kasha shawa hpung nlang hpe tsun shana wu yang
Exodus16:11 Yehowa mung
Exodus16:12 Shana de nanhte shan sha lu na marin dai; jahpawt mung muk hte hkru kat na marin dai: shaloi ngai nanhte a Karai Kasang Yehowa rai nga nngai gaw nanhte chye lu na marin dai
Exodus16:13 Dai hte maren shana de u preng ni hkrat nna dai dap hpe up di da mu ai: jahpawt mung dai dap grup yin e mari hkrat nga ai.
Exodus16:14 Dai mari hkoi mat yang
Exodus16:15 Israela kashu kasha ni dai hpe mu ma yang
Exodus16:16 Langai hte langai tinang sha law hpu magawn la mu; tinang sum hta rawng ai masha hti yu nna
Exodus16:17 Israela kashu kasha ni mung shing rai masha law n law hku hkan nna
Exodus16:18 Dai hpe uma bye hte hteng yu mu yang
Exodus16:19 Bai Mawshe gaw
Exodus16:20 Rai timung nkau mi gaw Mawshe a ga n madat ai hte jahpawt du hkra ngam da mu ai majaw dai gaw byet tai nna manam mat malu ai: dai rai nna Mawshe gaw shanhte hpe masin pawt wu ai.
Exodus16:21 Shanhte gaw langai hte langai tinang sha law hpu
Exodus16:22 Kru ya nhtoi hta e shawng na hta htam lahkawng
Exodus16:23 Shaloi shi gaw
Exodus16:24 Shanhte mung Mawshe a ga hte maren
Exodus16:25 Bai Mawshe gaw
Exodus16:26 Kru ya tup nanhte dai hpe magawn la lu na rai myit dai; sanit ya nhtoi chyawm gaw laban nhtoi rai nga ai rai nna
Exodus16:27 Masha nkau mi gaw dai sanit ya shani e sa hta na nga pru sa ma ai: rai timung shanhte n mu mu ai.
Exodus16:28 Dai majaw Yehowa gaw Mawshe hpe
Exodus16:29 Yu mu
Exodus16:30 Dai rai nna amyu masha ni sanit ya nhtoi hta ban sa nga ma ai.
Exodus16:31 Israela masha ni gaw dai hpe Manna ngu nna shamying mu ai: dai gaw hpakgyi tum zawn rai nna ahpraw nsam nga ai; lagat jahku hte kayau ai muk pa zawn dwi nga ai.
Exodus16:32 Bai Mawshe gaw
Exodus16:33 Dai hta kaga Mawshe gaw Arun hpe mung
Exodus16:34 Shing rai Yehowa Mawshe hpe htet da wu ai hte maren
Exodus16:35 Israela kashu kasha ni gaw masha nga ai ga de du ai du hkra
Exodus16:36 Uma mi ngu ai gaw Ehpa a htamshi hta htammi rai nga ai.
Exodus17:1 Ya Israela kashu kasha shawa hpung ting
Exodus17:2 Dai re ai majaw amyu masha ni gaw
Exodus17:3 Dai kaw e amyu masha ni hpang kara nna
Exodus17:4 Shaloi Mawshe gaw Yehowa hpe jahtau nna
Exodus17:5 Dai rai nna Yehowa gaw Mawshe hpe
Exodus17:6 Yu u
Exodus17:7 Dai Kaw e Israela kashu kasha ni gaw
Exodus17:8 Dai shaloi Amalek masha ni sa pru nna
Exodus17:9 Dai majaw Mawshe gaw
Exodus17:10 Shing rai Mawshe hkang dat ai hte maren Yawshu galaw nna Amalek ni hpe gasat wu ai; Mawshe
Exodus17:11 Ya Mawshe gaw shi a lat sharawt wu yang
Exodus17:12 Rai timung Mawshe a lata tsu wa lu ai rai nna
Exodus17:13 Yawshu mung Amalek du wa hte shi a masha ni hpe nhtu hte shayu kau wu ai.
Exodus17:14 Dai Majaw Yehowa gaw Mawshe hpe
Exodus17:15 Mawshe mung tawn hkungri galaw nna
Exodus17:16 dai gaw
Exodus18:1 Dai shaloi Midian hkinjawng wa Mawshe a katsa Yehtru gaw
Exodus18:2 Ya
Exodus18:3 kasha langai mi a amying gaw Gershom rai lu ai; dai gaw
Exodus18:4 langai mi a amying gaw Eliaza rai lu ai; dai gaw
Exodus18:5 Shing rai Mawshe a katsa Yehtru gaw shi a kashu yan hte kasha jan hpe woi nna
Exodus18:6 Ngai na ntsa Yehtru hte
Exodus18:7 Shaloi mawshe mung
Exodus18:8 Shaloi Mawshe gaw shi a katsa hpe
Exodus18:9 Yehtru mung
Exodus18:10 Dai majaw Yehtru gaw
Exodus18:11 Hpara mahkra hte hta Yehowa grau kaba nga ai gaw
Exodus18:12 Shaloi Mawshe a katsa Yehtru gaw Karai Kasang a matu wan nat hkungga hte mayu hkungga la sa ai rai nna
Exodus18:13 Hpang shani e Mawshe gaw amyu masha ni hpe tara dawdan ya na nga
Exodus18:14 Dai amyu masha ni hta Mawshe galaw ai amu nlang hpe shi a katsa mu ya wu yang
Exodus18:15 Mawshe gaw
Exodus18:16 shanhte amu rawng yang ngai kaw du sa nna ngai gaw masha wa hte shi a manang lapran e jeyang ya ai hte
Exodus18:17 Dai rai nna Mawshe a katsa gaw
Exodus18:18 nang mung
Exodus18:19 Ya nye a ga madat u; ngai nang hpe hpaji daw ya de ga; Karai Kasang mung nang hte rau nga u ga: nang gaw Karai Kasang hte seng ai lam hta shanhte a matu htingrai nna
Exodus18:20 ga matsun hte jep ai tara mung
Exodus18:21 Dai hta kaga
Exodus18:22 shanhte gaw galoi rai timung masha ni hpe tara dawdan ya mu ga; amu kaba rai yang sha nang kaw jashawn mu ga; amu kaji yawng gaw shanhte hkrai dawdan ya mu ga: dai rai jang shanhte nang hpe shingtau nna na a amu tsang na ra ai.
Exodus18:23 Ning rai Karai Kasang a ahkang hte nang galaw n yang gaw
Exodus18:24 Mawshe mung katsa wa a ga madat wu ai rai nna
Exodus18:25 Shing rai Mawshe gaw Israela amyu ting hta na myit su ai masha lata la nhtawm
Exodus18:26 Dai ni gaw
Exodus18:27 Dai hpang Mawshe gaw shi a katsa hpe shabawn dat wu ai; shi gaw shi a mung de bai wa mat ai.
Exodus19:1 Israela kashu kasha ni gaw Egutu mung na pru wa ai hpang
Exodus19:2 Rehpidim na shanhte htawt nna Sina nam mali de du ma yang
Exodus19:3 Shaloi Mawshe Karai Kasang hpang de lung wa nna
Exodus19:4 Egutu masha ni hpe ngai galaw ai lam hte
Exodus19:5 Dai re ai majaw
Exodus19:6 nanhte gaw nye a matu hkinjawng mungdan hte chyoi pra ai amyu tai na marin dai. Ga ndai hte gaw Israela kashu kasha ni hpe nang tsun na ga rai nga ai
Exodus19:7 Shaloi Mawshe bai wa nna
Exodus19:8 Dai amyu masha ni nlang hte mung
Exodus19:9 Bai Yehowa gaw
Exodus19:10 Dai rai nna Yehowa gaw Mawshe hpe
Exodus19:11 masum ya nhtoi hta shanhte chyip chyip rai nga mu ga: kaning rai nme law
Exodus19:12 Amyu masha ni n lai mai ai masin dai bum hpe grup di grang da nna
Exodus19:13 dai wa hpe lata hte hkum hkra myit; nlung hte kabai sat ai
Exodus19:14 Shaloi Mawshe gaw dai bum na amyu masha ni hpang de yu wa nna
Exodus19:15 Dai hta kaga shi gaw
Exodus19:16 Ya masum ya ngu na jahpawt hta mu ngoi ai
Exodus19:17 Shaloi Mawshe gaw amyu masha ni hpe Karai Kasang hte jahkrum na matu
Exodus19:18 Yehowa gaw wan galup ai hte Sina bum ntsa de yu hkrat wa ra ai majaw
Exodus19:19 Dai pahtau ngoi ai mung
Exodus19:20 Shaloi Yehowa gaw “Sina bum pungding de yu du nna
Exodus19:21 Yehowa mung
Exodus19:22 Yehowa kaw sit sa ai hkinjawng ni mung tinang hkum shachyoi shapra mu ga; dai n rai yang
Exodus19:23 Mawshe mung
Exodus19:24 Bai Yehowa gaw
Exodus19:25 Mawshe mung amyu masha ni hpang de yu hkrat wa nna
Exodus20:1 Shaloi Karai Kasang ndai mungga mahkra jaw dat let tsun wu ai gaw:
Exodus20:2 “Ngai gaw
Exodus20:3 Ngai hta kaga Karai Kasang shaje hpe hkum naw hkum ku et.
Exodus20:4 Lamu a lahta tang
Exodus20:5 dai hpe hkum naw hkum ku
Exodus20:6 ngai hpe tsawra nna ngai hkang da ai matsun hkan nang ai ni hpe gaw
Exodus20:7 Na a Karai Kasang Yehowa a mying ningsang hpe kaman lila hkum gang hkum tsun et; kaning rai nme law
Exodus20:8 Laban nhtoi hpe shachyoi shapra na
Exodus20:9 kru ya nhtoi tup nang amu bungli galaw nna
Exodus20:10 sanit ya nhtoi gaw na a Karai Kasang Yehowa a matu laban nhtoi rai nga ai; dai shani e
Exodus20:11 kaning rai nme law
Exodus20:12 Na a Karai Kasang Yehowa nang hpe jaw ai ga hta na a asak galu lit ga
Exodus20:13 Masha hkum sat et.
Exodus20:14 Masha num hkum shaw et.
Exodus20:15 Masha arai hkum lagu et.
Exodus20:16 Na a htingbu manang a lam n teng n man ai sakse hkum hkam et.
Exodus20:17 Na a htingbu manang a nta hpe ra marit ai myit hkum rawng et; na htingbu manang wa a madu jan hpe mung
Exodus20:18 Ya amyu masha ni nlang hte gaw
Exodus20:19 Shanhte gaw Mawshe hpe
Exodus20:20 Shaloi Mawshe gaw
Exodus20:21 Dai rai nna amyu masha ni gaw tsan tsan kaw e tsap nga ma ai; Mawshe chyawm gaw Karai Kasang rawng ai htat ai sumwi de sit sa wa ai.
Exodus20:22 Shaloi Yehowa gaw Mawshe hpe
Exodus20:23 Ngai hpe nawku ai lam hta
Exodus20:24 Nye a matu ga hkungri nang gaw na rai ndai; dai hta e na a wan nat hkungga hte mahku hkungga ngu na
Exodus20:25 Nye a matu nlung hkungri gaw n yang gaw
Exodus20:26 Dai hkungri ntsa e na kaya hpa n dawng lit ga
Exodus21:1 Da ndai mung nang shanhte hpe dawdan ya na tara rai nga ai:
Exodus21:2 Nang Hebre mayam mari wu yang gaw kru ning sha yam lu na rai wu ai: sanit ning ngu na hta gaw shi hkum manu n hkrat ai pru wa lu na rai wu ai;
Exodus21:3 ningnan yam ai kaw nna shi chyu sha rai yang gaw
Exodus21:4 Shing n rai
Exodus21:5 Rai timung dai mayam wa
Exodus21:6 shi a madu gaw
Exodus21:7 Masha langai ngai tinang a shayi sha hpe mayam di nna dut kau wu yang gaw
Exodus21:8 Shi a madu gaw shi hpe la nhtawm
Exodus21:9 Tinang kasha hpe la ya wu yang gaw
Exodus21:10 Num kaga bai la kahtap ya wu yang gaw
Exodus21:11 Ndai lam masum n shatup na rai yang gaw
Exodus21:12 Mahsa hpe sat kau ai wa gaw
Exodus21:13 Sat na nga dingsa di ai n re ai sha
Exodus21:14 Manang wa hpe sat na nga
Exodus21:15 Kanu kawa hpe sat ai wa gaw
Exodus21:16 Masha hpe lagu ai wa gaw
Exodus21:17 Kanu kawa hpe matsa ai wa gaw
Exodus21:18 Masha shada ga law nna langai mi gaw manang wa hpe nlung hte rai yang rai
Exodus21:19 bai rat nna shi a kawhkrawng hte shinggan de rat hkawm lu ai rai yang mung
Exodus21:20 Masha langai ngai tinang a mayam num
Exodus21:21 rai timung dai mayam wa lani
Exodus21:22 Masha shada kamu hkat nna hkum n manu ai numsha hpe hkra wu ai majaw
Exodus21:23 Rai timung nma kap yang gaw
Exodus21:24 myi a matu myi
Exodus21:25 wan hkru ai a majaw wan hkru ai
Exodus21:26 Masha langai ngai shi a mayam num
Exodus21:27 Dai hte maren mayam num mayam la a wa hpe kayat daw ya wu yang gaw
Exodus21:28 Dumsu langai ngai numsha
Exodus21:29 Nga dai shawng de daru ga nga ai rai nna
Exodus21:30 Gumhpraw wa na hku dawdan ya mu yang gaw
Exodus21:31 Masha wa a shayi shadang hpe daru sat ya yang mung dai hte maren shi hpe di lu na rai wu ai.
Exodus21:32 Masha wa mayam num mayam la hpe daru sat ya wu yang gaw
Exodus21:33 Masha langai ngai nhkun hpaw da ai rai yang rai
Exodus21:34 nhkun hpaw da ai wa
Exodus21:35 Masha langai a usu gaw manang a usu hpe daru sat ai rai yang
Exodus21:36 Usu dai shawng de daru ga nga ai hpe madu chye ninglen n dun n rem ai dat da ai rai yang gaw
Exodus22:1 Masha langai ngai
Exodus22:2 Lagut wa nta tawk waw nga yang
Exodus22:3 Rai timung jan pru sai rai yang gaw bunglat wa lu na rai nga ai: shi wa lu na lam nga nga ai; shi hpa mung n lu yang gaw shi lagu ai rai a matu shi hkum hpe dut kau lu na rai nga ai.
Exodus22:4 Shi lagu ai usu rai yang rai
Exodus22:5 Masha wa a yi hkauna hta rai yang rai
Exodus22:6 Wan nat dat ai majaw
Exodus22:7 Masha langai ngai shi a htingbu wa kaw aja gumhpraw
Exodus22:8 Lagut wa hpe n mu hkrup yang gaw
Exodus22:9 Kaning rai nme law
Exodus22:10 Masha langai ngai shi a htingbu wa kaw
Exodus22:11 rem ya wa gaw manang wa a rai shi la ai n la ai
Exodus22:12 Rai timung shi kaw na masha lagu mat wa ai rai yang gaw
Exodus22:13 Rai matse e kawa sat ai rai yang gaw sakse matu si mang madun u ga: kawa sat hkrum ai a matu shi wa lu na n rai.
Exodus22:14 Masha langai ngai htingbu wa kaw na lama ma shap la nna
Exodus22:15 madu hte rai yang gaw shap ai wa
Exodus22:16 Masha langai ngai kadai garai n mahtan ai mahkawn hpe lau nna shi hte yup nga yang gaw
Exodus22:17 Rai timung kawa n jaw n ya mayu yang gaw
Exodus22:18 Nat sangau ai num hpe jahkrung da lu na ndai n rai.
Exodus22:19 Yamnga hte kanawn ai kadai rai timung teng teng sat kau ai hkrum lu na rai nga ai.
Exodus22:20 Yehowa hta kaga hpara shaje a man e hkungga jau ai wa gaw
Exodus22:21 Egutu mung e nanhte masha tsasam manam hpe yu manit dai majaw
Exodus22:22 Gaida jan hte jahkrai nmai ma hpe nanhte sharu shatsang lu na n rai.
Exodus22:23 Nang shan hpe lama ma di sharu shatsang nna
Exodus22:24 nye a myit pawt bu na hte
Exodus22:25 Nang hte rau nga ai nye a amyu matsan mayan wa hpe
Exodus22:26 Na a htingbu wa nang kaw shi a hpajawng sa tang da yang
Exodus22:27 shi a hpun palawng mung rai lu ai: shi hpa hpun yup na rai ta? ngai matsan dum nga nngai majaw
Exodus22:28 Nang Karai Kasang hpe shatan lu na ndai n rai; na amyu hta na du hpe mung matsa lu na n rai.
Exodus22:29 Shawng myin ai nsi naisi
Exodus22:30 Dai hte maren
Exodus22:31 Nanhte nye a chyoi pra ai masha tai nga na rai myit dai; dai re ai majaw
Exodus23:1 N teng n man ai shiga nang htawn tsun lu na n rai; tara n lang ai ni hte rau n teng n man ai sakse hkam na
Exodus23:2 N hkru ai amu galaw na masha law ai maga de hkum hkan et; amu tsun ai lam hta tara man ai hku jahten na
Exodus23:3 matsan mayan wa hpe rai timung shi a amu hta maga lu na n rai.
Exodus23:4 Nang hte majan ai wa a dumsu shing n rai lawze
Exodus23:5 Nang hpe n dawng ai wa a lawze
Exodus23:6 Nang hta matsan mayan re ai wa amu rawng yang
Exodus23:7 N teng n man ai amu hta tsan tsan koi nga u; mara n rawng ai wa hte dingman ai wa hpe nang sat lu na n rai: kaning rai nme law
Exodus23:8 Nang sake manawn sha lu na ndai n rai: kaning rai nme law
Exodus23:9 Masha tsasam hpe nang sharu shatsang lu na n rai; Egutu mung e nanhte hkum dai masha tsasam tai yu manit dai majaw
Exodus23:10 Kru ning tup na a yi hkauna ga hta nang gat hkai nna nsi naisi shu la na rai ndai:
Exodus23:11 sanit ning ngu na hta
Exodus23:12 Kru ya nhtoi tup nang amu bungli hta galaw shaja nna
Exodus23:13 Ngai nanhte hpe tsun matsun mahkra hta sadi nga mu; hpara kaga a amying hkum tsun
Exodus23:14 Nang nye a matu laning mi hta masum lang poi galaw lu na rai ndai.
Exodus23:15 Dai azuma poi nang galaw lu na rai ndai: ngai nang hpe hkang da ai hte maren
Exodus23:16 yi hkauna galaw nna nsi naisi nnan shu ai shaloi
Exodus23:17 Nanhte hta na lasha nlang hte gaw
Exodus23:18 Ngai hpe nawng ai hkungga asai hte matsi rawng ai muk shagup nna jau lu na n rai: ngai e jau ai hkungga hta na asau hpe jahpawt du hkra ngam da lu na n rai.
Exodus23:19 Na a yi hkauna na shawng ngai ai nsi naisi
Exodus23:20 Yu u
Exodus23:21 Shi a man e sadi nga mu
Exodus23:22 Nang gaja wa shi a ga madat nna
Exodus23:23 Nye a kasa na a shawng e sa wa nna
Exodus23:24 Shanhte a hpara ni hpe nang nawku lu na n rai; dai ni hpe jaw jau lu na n rai; shanhte a lai len hku mung nang hkan lu na ndai n rai: shanhte hpe nang atsai awai tsan kau nna
Exodus23:25 Nanhte a Karai Kasang Yehowa hpe sha nanhte jau lu na rai nna
Exodus23:26 Na a mung hta e nbya bya ai hte maudung dung ai
Exodus23:27 Ngai hpe hkrit gari na myit na a shawng e ngai shangun dat nna
Exodus23:28 Dai hta kaga
Exodus23:29 Dai amyu masha ni hpe laning jan sha hta nanhte a man na ngai n shapraw kau na mawe ai; shing di yang
Exodus23:30 Nang law htam wa nna
Exodus23:31 Na a lamu ga jarit hpe nawng hkyeng kaw nna Hpiliste nawng du hkra
Exodus23:32 Shanhte hte mung
Exodus23:33 Shanhte nang hpe ngai e n shut shangun mu ga
Exodus24:1 Bai Yehowa gaw Mawshe hpe
Exodus24:2 Mawshe chyu sha Yehowa hpang de sit sa lu na rai nga ai; kaga ni gaw sit sa lu na n rai; amyu masha ni mung
Exodus24:3 Shaloi Mawshe yu wa nna
Exodus24:4 Mawshe gaw Yehowa a ga mahkra ka da ngut jang
Exodus24:5 Israela kashu kasha hta na shabrang ni hpe shi shangun dat nna shanhte gaw
Exodus24:6 Mawshe gaw sai ka-ang hkup la nna dai hpe ang hta bang tawn wu ai; ka-ang hkup gaw tawn hkungri hta lapri bun wu ai.
Exodus24:7 Dai ga shaka laika mung shi la nna shawa hpawng a man e hti dan wu ai: shanhte mung
Exodus24:8 Bai Mawshe gaw dai sai la nna amyu masha ni hpe lapri bun let
Exodus24:9 Shaloi Mawshe hte Arun
Exodus24:10 shanhte gaw Israela a Karai Kasang hpe mu ma ai; shi a lagaw npu e
Exodus24:11 Shi gaw Israela a du salang ni hpe shi a lata hte hkra wu ai n rai
Exodus24:12 Bai Yehowa gaw Mawshe hpe
Exodus24:13 Shaloi Mawshe hte shi a hkringmang Yawshu rawt nna
Exodus24:14 Salang ni hpe mung
Exodus24:15 Shaloi Mawshe dai bum de lung wa ai; sumwi mung dai bum hpe ka-up da wu ai.
Exodus24:16 Yehowa a hpung shingkang Sina bum ntsa e dan hkung nga ai hte
Exodus24:17 Yehowa a hpung shingkang gaw
Exodus24:18 Shaloi Mawshe gaw dai sumwi kata de shang nna dai bum de du lung wa ai: Mawshe gaw dai bum ntsa e nhtoi mali shi ya tup nga nga ai.
Exodus25:1 Shaloi Yehowa Mawshe hpe tsun wu ai gaw
Exodus25:2 “Israela kashu kasha ni nye a matu Kumhpaw kumhpa la sa na tsun mu: kam jaw ai myit hte jaw mayu ai masha hkum shagu hta na
Exodus25:3 Shanhte kaw na nanhte hkap la da na alu kumhpa baw gaw ndai rai na rai malit dai; aja
Exodus25:4 sawm tsit ai ri
Exodus25:5 jaw shahkyeng ai sagu la hpyi
Exodus25:6 wan shatu na matu sau; chya ya na namman hte manam pyaw ai baw nat na matu manam pyaw ai baw;
Exodus25:7 unuk lungseng
Exodus25:8 Ngai shanhte hta shanu nga na matu
Exodus25:9 Ngai nang hpe madun dan de ai kasi hte maren
Exodus25:10 “Marau hpun hte sumpu langai mi shanhte galaw na rai mu ai: dai gaw
Exodus25:11 Dai hpe kata
Exodus25:12 De a matu mung ja shanghkawng mali jaw la nna
Exodus25:13 Marau hpun hte kandang mung nang galaw nna
Exodus25:14 Dai sumpu hpe hpai na matu
Exodus25:15 Dai kandang ni hpe sumpu a shanghkawng ni hta na n shaw kau ai sha tutnawng dinghkrawn da na rai mu ai.
Exodus25:16 Ngai nang e jaw na de ai sakse ga hpe dai sumpu hta nang bang da na rai ndai.
Exodus25:17 Ja jet hte Chyeju magap mung nang galaw lu na rai ndai; dai mung galu de dawng lahakang e lahkam mi
Exodus25:18 Ja hte Hkerubim lahkawng mung nang galaw lu na rai ndai; dai chyeju magap a matu maga mi hte maga mi de tawk nna nang galaw na rai ndai.
Exodus25:19 Ndai matu de Hkerub langai mi
Exodus25:20 Dai Hkerubim lahkawng yan myi man hkrum rai nna
Exodus25:21 Chyeju magap dai hpe sumpu hta magap tawn da na rai wu ai; ngai nang hpe jaw na de ai sakse ga hpe dai sumpu kata e nang bang da lu na rai ndai.
Exodus25:22 Dai kaw e ngai nang hte jahkrum nna
Exodus25:23 “Bai marau hpun hte ku langai mi nang galaw lu na rai ndai; dai gaw
Exodus25:24 Dai hpe ja jet hte nang kayawp na rai wu ai; dai hta grup grup ja hte htinggawt dat na rai wu ai.
Exodus25:25 Dai hta e
Exodus25:26 De a matu ja hte shanghkawng mali nang galaw nna
Exodus25:27 Dai ku hpai na matu
Exodus25:28 Dai ku hpai na matu marau hpun hte kadang mung nang galaw nna
Exodus25:29 Dai ku hte seng ai wan ni
Exodus25:30 Nye a man e ku dai hta tutnawng madun dan nga na muk nang bang tawn da lu na rai ndai.”
Exodus25:31 “Ja jet hte pyengdin shadun langi mi mung nang galaw lu na rai ndai: dai pyengdin shadun na htumpa
Exodus25:32 dai madung hta nna
Exodus25:33 dai pyengdin madung hta na pru ai maga mi a lakying langai mi hta nampan pu zawn re ai wan masum hte de a gumdin masum yep yep rai nga ai; bai maga mi de na lakying langai mi hta mung
Exodus25:34 dai pyengdin madung hta mung
Exodus25:35 bai lakying man shagu a matut ai npu e gumdin langai ngai rai na rai nga ai: shing rai dai pyengdin madung na pru ai lakying man masum a matu rai na rai nga ai.
Exodus25:36 De a gumdin ni hte lakying ni hpe langai sha di nna
Exodus25:37 Dai hta shadun na pyengdin sanit mung
Exodus25:38 De a lakap ni hte kap bang na wan ni mung ja jet hte rai na rai nga ai.
Exodus25:39 Dai pyengdin hte de a arai mahkra hpe ja jet joi shi daram hte galaw lu na rai nga ai.
Exodus25:40 Bum e nang hpe madun dan sade ai kasi hte maren dai hte hpe galaw lu hkra sadi nga u.
Exodus26:1 Dai hta kaga di sumpan sum mung
Exodus26:2 Nba grang langai mi a galu de dawng hkun matsat
Exodus26:3 Nba grang manga hte hpe langai hte langai matut lu na rai nga ai; bai nba grang manga hte hpe langai hte langai matut lu na rai nga ai.
Exodus26:4 Shing rai matut ai nba grang a shakung hku
Exodus26:5 Nba grang langai mi hta shangwang hku manga shi
Exodus26:6 Ja hte chinghkyi manga shi nang galaw lu nna
Exodus26:7 Bai dai sumpan sum
Exodus26:8 Nba grang langai mi a galu de dawng sumshi
Exodus26:9 Bai nba grang manga hte hpe nang langai sha di nna matut na rai wu ai; nba grang kru hpe mung
Exodus26:10 Matut ngut sai nba grang langai mi a shakung lam mi hta shangwang hku manga shi
Exodus26:11 Magri hte chyinghkyi manga shi nang galaw nna
Exodus26:12 Dai ntsa htap na nba grang kra ai ka-ang hkup hpe gaw
Exodus26:13 Dai sum a maga mi hte maga mi de kra nga ai nba grang dawng dawng
Exodus26:14 Bai dai sum galup na matu jaw shahkyeng ai sagu la hpyi hte magap langai mi
Exodus26:15 Dai sumpan sum a shakum matu
Exodus26:16 Hpunpyen langai mi a galu de dawng shi
Exodus26:17 Dai hpunpyen ni mahkra hpe
Exodus26:18 Dai sumpan sum a matu dingda maga de hpunpyen hkun
Exodus26:19 Dai hpunpyen hkun a htumpa de na matu gumhpraw hte machyaw mali shi nang jaw lu na rai ndai: hpunpyen langai mi hta na dawhkai lahkawng a matu
Exodus26:20 Dai hte maren sumpan sum a kaga maga
Exodus26:21 de a matu mung gumhpraw machyaw mali shi jaw nna
Exodus26:22 Dai sumpan sum a nbang ngu na sinna maga a matu mung hpunpyen kru galaw lu na rai ndai.
Exodus26:23 Dai sumpan sum a nbang jut lahkawng a matu hpunpyen lahkawng nang galaw na rai ndai.
Exodus26:24 Dai lahkawng hpe htumpa de e kahtap nna
Exodus26:25 Shing rai hpunpyen matsat hte da a gumhpraw machyaw shi kru rai na rai nga ai: hpunpyen langai mi a htumpa e machyaw lahkawng hkawng
Exodus26:26 Bai marau hpun hte htinggrang mung nang galaw lu na rai ndai; sumpan sum shakum maga mi de na matu htinggrang manga nga rai na rai nga ai;
Exodus26:27 bai sumpan sum a nbang ngu na sinna maga de na matu htinggrang manga rai na rai nga ai.
Exodus26:28 Ka-ang na htinggrang gaw nbang npan hkren jut htuk htuk
Exodus26:29 Dai hpunpyen ni hpe ja hte nang kayawp nna
Exodus26:30 Dai bum e nang hpe madun dan sade ai kasi hte maren
Exodus26:31 Bai
Exodus26:32 gumhpraw machyaw mali hta jung tawn ai ja hte sup sai marau hpun shadaw mali hta nang dai hpe noi da na rai wu ai: dai hta noi ai chyinghkyi mung ja rai na rai nga ai.
Exodus26:33 Dai nba shinggang hpe chyinghkyi ni hta noi grang nna
Exodus26:34 Dai chyoi pra htum ai shara na sakse sumpu hta dai chyeju magap hpe nang magap da na rai wu ai.
Exodus26:35 Dai nba shinggang a shinggan ngu na de dai ku hpe tawn da nna
Exodus26:36 Bai dai sum a chyinghka a matu sawm tsit ai
Exodus26:37 Dai chyinghka grang noi na matu
Exodus27:1 “Tawn hkungri hpe mung marau hpun hte nang galaw lu na rai ndai: de a galu de dawng manga
Exodus27:2 De a jut mali hta nrung mung nang shatut na rai ndai; de a nrung ni kanu hte langai sha rai na rai nga ai; dai hte hpe magri hte nang kayap lu na rai ndai.
Exodus27:3 Dap hte kau na di ni hte
Exodus27:4 Magri awa hte de a matu magrang nang galaw lu na rai nga ndai; dai magri awa a ntsa jut mali hta magri shanghkawng mali mung nang galaw na rai ndai.
Exodus27:5 Magri awa dai hpe tawn hkungri a ka-ang hkup
Exodus27:6 Dai tawn hkungri hpai na matu marau hpun hte nang kandang galaw nna magri hte kayawp na rai wu ai.

Exodus34:32 Dai hpang Israela kashu kasha ni nlang hte sit sa ma ai rai nna
Exodus34:33 Mawshe gaw shanhte hpe ga tsun ngut jang
Exodus34:34 Yehowa kaw shang ai shaloi
Exodus34:35 Mawshe a myi man a hpyi ahpraw tu kabrim nga lu ai gaw
Exodus35:1 Shaloi Mawshe gaw Israela kashu kasha shawa hpung nlang hte hpe jahpawng tawn nna
Exodus35:2 Kru ya tup amu bungli nang galaw shachyen lu na rai ndai; sanit ya ngu na nhtoi gaw
Exodus35:3 Nanhte a nga shara shagu hta
Exodus35:4 Bai Mawshe gaw Israela kashu kasha ni a shawa hpung nlang hte hpe
Exodus35:5 Nanhte hta na Yehowa a matu kumhpaw kumhpa lahkawn la mu: kam jaw ai myit hte jaw mayu ai masha hkum shagu
Exodus35:6 sawn tsit ai
Exodus35:7 jaw shahkyen ai sagu la hpyi
Exodus35:8 wan shatu na matu sau; chya ya na namman hte manam pyaw ai baw nat na matu
Exodus35:9 unkuk lungseng
Exodus35:10 “Nanhte hta na myit hpaji rawng ai ni kadai mung Yehowa hkang da mada hte maren
Exodus35:11 sumpan nta hte de a sum
Exodus35:12 bai sumpu hte de a kandang yan
Exodus35:13 dai muk ku hte de a kandang
Exodus35:14 wan shatu na pyengdin shadun hte dai hte seng ai arai ni
Exodus35:15 manam pyaw ai baw nat na matu hkungri hte de a kandang
Exodus35:16 wan nat hkungga nawng na tawn hkungri hte
Exodus35:17 wanggrang hte de a shadaw
Exodus35:18 sumpan sum ai mailak
Exodus35:19 chyoi pra ai shara e daw jau yang na matu reng ai hpun palawng
Exodus35:20 Shaloi Israela kashu kasha shawa hpung mahkra hte Mawshe kaw na pru wa shajang nna
Exodus35:21 tinang myit hta katu ai masha
Exodus35:22 Kam jaw ai shawang myit rawng ai numsha lasha ni yawng
Exodus35:23 Sawm tsit ai
Exodus35:24 Gumhpraw hte magri kumhpa jaw ai ni mung
Exodus35:25 Hpaji maka rawng ai numsha ni nlang hte mung tinang a lata hte ri ri nna ri ngut sai sawm tsit ai
Exodus35:26 Hpaji maka rawng ai hte tinang myit katu ai numsha ni nlang hte mung
Exodus35:27 Agyi salang ni mung unuk lungseng hte
Exodus35:28 wan shatu na matu
Exodus35:29 Shing rai

Exodus35:31 shi gaw aja
Exodus35:32 hpaji hparat
Exodus35:33 reng hkik ai amu galaw chye na matu Karai Kasang a Wenyi shi hta jahpring nu ai.

Exodus35:35 Dai yan gaw
Exodus36:1 Shing rai Bezalela yan Aholiaba hte Yehowa e hpaji hparat hte zai byeng-ya jahpring ai myit su ai ni nlang hte gaw
Exodus36:2 Bai Mawshe gaw Bezalela yan Aholiaba hte
Exodus36:3 shanhte gaw
Exodus36:4 Hpaji rawng nna dai chyoi pra ai nta a daw jau rai galaw ai ni mung
Exodus36:5 Yehowa hkang da ai hte galaw law na hta n-ga jan hkra la sa masai
Exodus36:6 Shaloi Mawshe gaw
Exodus36:7 Lu la sai rai ni mung
Exodus36:8 Shing rai myit hpaji rawng nna dai amu galaw ai ni gaw dai sumpan nta hpe nba grang shi hte galaw mu ai: dai nba grang ni gaw kaboi ngut sai mani ai lachyit ri
Exodus36:9 Nba grang langai mi a galu de dawng hkun matsat
Exodus36:10 Bai shi gaw nba grang manga hte hpe langai hte langai matut wu ai: bai nba grang manga hte hpe langai hte langai matut wu ai.
Exodus36:11 Shing rai matut ai nba grang a shakung hku
Exodus36:12 Nba grang langai mi hta shangwang hku manga shi; bai matut nga ai kaga langai mi a shakung lam mi hta shangwang hku manga shi di nna
Exodus36:13 Ja jet chyinghkyi manga shi mung shi galaw nna
Exodus36:14 Bai
Exodus36:15 Nba grang langai mi a galu de dawng sumshi
Exodus36:16 Bai nba grang manga hte hpe
Exodus36:17 Matut ngut sai nba grang langai mi a shakung lam mi hta
Exodus36:18 Magri hte chyinghkyi manga shi mung shi galaw nna
Exodus36:19 Bai
Exodus36:20 Bai sumpan sum a shakum matu marau hpun hte hpunpyen shadun mung shi galaw wu ai.
Exodus36:21 Hpunpyen langai mi a galu de dawng shi
Exodus36:22 Dai hpunpyen ni mahkra hpe langai mi hta dawhkai lahkawng hkawng galaw bang nna
Exodus36:23 Dai sumpan sum a dingda maga de na matu hpunpyen hkun shi galaw wu ai:
Exodus36:24 dai hpunpyen hkun a htumpa de na matu
Exodus36:25 Dai hte maren dai sumpan sum a kaga maga
Exodus36:26 hpunpyen hkun hte de a matu gumhpraw machyaw maili shi jaw nna
Exodus36:27 dai sumpan sum a nbang ngu na sinna maga a matu mung
Exodus36:28 Dai sumpan sum a nbang jut lahkawng a matu mung
Exodus36:29 dai lahkawng hpe htumpa de kahtap nna matu de na shanghkawng du hkra maren di wu ai: shing di dai jut lahkawng hpe shangut wu ai.
Exodus36:30 Shing rai hpunpyen matsat hte de a gumhpraw machyaw shi kru rai nga ai: hpunpyen langai mi a htumpa e machyaw lahkawng hkawng rai nga ai.
Exodus36:31 Bai marau hpun hte htinggrang mung shi galaw wu ai; sumpan sum a maga mi de na matu htinggrang manga nga galaw wu ai.
Exodus36:32 bai sumpan sum a nbang ngu na sinna mata de na hpunpyen ni a matu mung htinggrang manga galaw wu ai.
Exodus36:33 Ka-ang na htinggrang hpe gaw nbang npan hkren jut htuk htuk tawk nna dinghkren wu ai.
Exodus36:34 Dai hpunpyen ni hpe ja hte shi kayawp nna

Exodus37:1 Bai bezalela gaw marau hpun hte dai sumpu galaw wu ai: dai gaw galu de dawng lahkawng e lahkam mi
Exodus37:2 dai hpe kata
Exodus37:3 De a matu mung ja shanghkawng mali jaw la nna
Exodus37:4 Marau hpun hte kandang mung shi galaw nna ja hte sup wu ai.
Exodus37:5 Dai sumpu hpe hpai na matu sumpu a maga mi hte maga mi de na shanghkawng ni hta dai kandang dinghkrawn da wu ai.
Exodus37:6 Ja jet hte chyeju magap mung shi galaw wu ai; dai mung galu de dawng lahkawng e lahkam mi
Exodus37:7 Ja hte Hkerubim lahkawng mung shi galaw wu ai; chyeju magap a matu maga mi hte maga mi hte maga mi de tawk nna galaw wu ai:

Exodus37:9 Dai Hkerubim lahkawng yan myi man hkrum rai nna

Exodus37:12 Dai hta e de a matu grup grup lahpa hpa shakra da nna
Exodus37:13 De a matu ja hte shanghkawng malli mung shi jaw nna
Exodus37:14 Dai ku hpai na matu dai kra ai a npu e shanghkawng ni hpe shatut da nna
Exodus37:15 Dai ku hpai na matu mung marau hpun hte kandang galaw nna ja jet hte kayawp wu ai.
Exodus37:16 Ku dai hte seng ai wan ni
Exodus37:17 Bai
Exodus37:18 Dai madung hta nna maga mi de lahkying masum sum di nna lakying kru shapraw wu ai.
Exodus37:19 dai pyengdin madung hta na pru ai maga mi a lakying langai mi hta nampan pu zawn re ai wan masum hte de a gumdin masum yep yep rai nga ai: bai maga mi de na lakying langai mi hta mung nampan pu zawn re ai wan masum hte de a gumdin masum yep yep rai nga ai; dai zawn dai pyengdin madung hta na pru ai lakying kru hte hta shing re ai hkrai rai nga ai.
Exodus37:20 Dai pyengdin madung hta mung nampan pu zawn re ai wan mali hte de a gumdin mali yep yep rai nga ai;
Exodus37:21 bai lakying man shagu a matut ai npu e gumdin langai ngai rai nga ai; shing rai dai pyengdin madung na pru ai lakying man masum ting hta rai nga ai.
Exodus37:22 De a gumdin ni hte lakying ni hpe langai sha di nna
Exodus37:23 Dai hta shadun na pyengdin sanit mung
Exodus37:24 Dai pyengdin hte de a arai mahkra hpe ja jet joi shi hte galaw wu ai.

Exodus40:11 Dai ntsin htung hte

Exodus40:20 Bai

Exodus40:22 Muk ku hpe mung dai shawa sum a sumpan nta a nhku e
Exodus40:23 dai ku hta Yehowa a man e madun dan ai muk mung shi mara da wu ai: dai gaw Yehowa Mawshe hpe hkang da ai hte maren rai nga ai.
Exodus40:24 Pyengdin shadun mung
Exodus40:25 Yehowa a man e pyengdin ni hpe shatu tawn wu ai: dai gaw Yehowa Mawshe hpe hkang da ai hte maren rai nga ai.
Exodus40:26 Ja hkungri hpe mung shawa sum a sumpan nta nhku
Exodus40:27 dai hkungri hta manam pyaw ai baw nat da wu ai: dai gaw Yehowa Mawshe hpe hkang da hte maren rai nga ai.
Exodus40:28 Dai sumpan nta a chyinghka lam e mung
Exodus40:29 Wan nat hkungga a tawn hkungri hpe mung

Exodus40:31 Mawshe mung

Exodus40:33 Dai sumpan nta hte tawn hkungri a grup yin e dai wang shi sharawt nna
Exodus40:34 Shaloi dai sumwi gaw shawa sum hpe ka-up nna Yehowa a hpung shingkang dai sumpan nta hta hpring nga ai.
Exodus40:35 Shing rai dai sumwi gaw shawa sum hpe ka-up nga ai hte Yehowa hpung shingkang dai sumpan nta hta hpring nga ai majaw dai kata de Mawshe n shang lu wu ai.
Exodus40:36 Dai sumpan nta ntsa na sumwi shalun la jang
Exodus40:37 dai sumwi n shalun la yang gaw
Exodus40:38 Kaning rai nme law
Leviticus1:1 Shaloi Yehowa shawa sum kaw nna Mawshe hpe shaga tsun wu ai gaw
Leviticus1:2 Israela kashu kasha ni hpe nang ning ngu tsun na rai ndai: Nanhte hta na kadai rai timung Yehowa hpe kumhpa jaw mayu myit yang gaw
Leviticus1:3 Jaw mayu ai kumhpa dai dumsu hte wan nat hkungga di na rai yang gaw
Leviticus1:4 Shi jaw ai wan nat hkungga a baw hta shi a lata mara lu na rai nna
Leviticus1:5 Dai usu hpe Yehowa a man e shi sat na rai nna
Leviticus1:6 Bai shi gaw dai hkungga hkum hpe hpyi gaw kau nna
Leviticus1:7 Arun a shadang sha hkinjawng ni gaw tawn hkungri hta wan wut nna
Leviticus1:8 dai hkungri na wan a hpun shinggyawm hta Arun a shadang sha
Leviticus1:9 pu sin ni hte lagaw ni hpe mung shawng kashin kau nhtawm
Leviticus1:10 Bai jaw jau mayu ai wan nat kumhpa gaw
Leviticus1:11 Dai hpe Yehowa a man tawn hkungri a dingdung maga e sat nna
Leviticus1:12 Dai hkungga hpe shi hpya kahtum na rai nna
Leviticus1:13 pu sin ni hte lagaw ni hpe shi naw kashin kau nhtawm
Leviticus1:14 Bai
Leviticus1:15 Hkinjawng wa gaw dai hpe tawn hkungri de la sa nna
Leviticus1:16 de a ma-u hte dai hta rawng ai rai hpe shaw kau nhtawm
Leviticus1:17 dai hpe singkaw hte nawng
Leviticus2:1 Masha langai ngai Yehowa hpe shadung hte kumhpa nawng ai rai yang gaw
Leviticus2:2 Dai hpe Arun a shadang sha hkinjawng ni hpang de shi la sa nna
Leviticus2:3 Ngam nga ai shadung kumhpa gaw Arun hte shi a shadang sha ni a matu tai na rai nga ai: dai gaw Yehowa hpe wan hte nawng ai kumhpa ni hta na chyoi pra reng ai kumhpa rai nga ai.
Leviticus2:4 Bai
Leviticus2:5 Bai
Leviticus2:6 Dai hpe nang ahkyep nna namman ru bun na rai wu ai: dai gaw shadung kumhpa rai nga ai.
Leviticus2:7 Bai
Leviticus2:8 Shing re ai shadung kumhpa amyu hpe Yehowa hpang de nang la sa nhtawm
Leviticus2:9 Bai
Leviticus2:10 Ngam nga ai shadung kumhpa gaw Arun hte shi a shadang sha ni a matu tai na rai nga ai: dai gaw Yehowa hpe wan hte nawng ai kumhpa ni hta na chyoi pra reng ai kumhpa rai nga ai.
Leviticus2:11 Yehowa hpe nanhte sak jaw ai shadung kumhpa baw hta matsi lawm lu na n rai: Yehowa hpe wan hte kumhpa nawng yang
Leviticus2:12 Shawng ngai ai nsi naisi sak jaw ai lam hta Yehowa hpe matsi hte lagat jahku sak jaw lu ai rai timung
Leviticus2:13 Shadung kumhpa nawng shagu jum bang lu na rai ndai: na a shadung kumhpa nawng ai hta
Leviticus2:14 Shawng ngai ai nsi naisi hte Yehowa hpe shadung kumhpa hku nawng mayu yang gaw
Leviticus2:15 Dai hta nang namman ru bun nna lawban bang na rai wu ai: dai gaw shadung kumhpa rai nga ai.
Leviticus2:16 Shing rai hkinjawng wa gaw dai rip la ai n-gu nkau mi
Leviticus3:1 Bai shi a kumhpa dai
Leviticus3:2 Shi a hkungga a baw hta tinang a lata mara nhtawm
Leviticus3:3 Bai shi gaw
Leviticus3:4 mashi marung hta kap ai nhkyun tawng lahkawng hte dai hta kap ai sau
Leviticus3:5 Arun a shadang sha ni gaw dai hpe tawn hkungri na wan mang e nat da ai wan nat hkungga hta nat shalawm na rai mu ai: dai gaw Yehowa hpe wan hte nat nawng ai manam pyaw sangau rai nga ai.
Leviticus3:6 Bai shi a kumhpa dai
Leviticus3:7 Shi a kumhpa sagu kasha rai yang gaw
Leviticus3:8 Shi jaw ai hkungga a baw hta tinang a lata mara nhtawm
Leviticus3:9 Bai shi gaw Yehowa a man e wan hte nawng ai mahku hkungga shatai na
Leviticus3:10 mashi marung hta kap ai nhkyun tawng lahkawng hte dai hta kap ai sau; nhkyun tawng yan hte nawng sin hta kap ai sap sanap re ai ni hpe shaw la ngut jang
Leviticus3:11 hkinjawng wa gaw dai hpe tawn hkungri hta nat na rai wu ai: dai gaw Yehowa a matu wan hte nat nawng ai lusha kumhpa rai nga ai.
Leviticus3:12 Shi a kumhpa bainam rai yang gaw
Leviticus3:13 de a baw hta shi a lata mara nhtawm
Leviticus3:14 Bai shi gaw Yehowa hpe wan hte nawng ai hkungga di na matu
Leviticus3:15 mashi marung hta kap ai nhkyun tawng lahkawng hte dai hta kap ai sau; nhkyun tawng yan hte nawng sin hta kap ai sap sanap re ai ni hpe shaw la ngut jang
Leviticus3:16 hkinjawng wa gaw dai hpe tawn hkungri hta nat na rai wu ai: dai gaw manam pyaw sangau hku wan hte nawng ai shahpa kumhpa rai nga ai: sau yawng gaw Yehowa a matu hkrai rai nga ai.
Leviticus3:17 Nanhte gaw sau man rai timung
Leviticus4:1 Bai
Leviticus4:2 Israela kashu kasha ni e ning ngu tsun u: Masha langai ngai Yehowa hkang da ai lam lama ma hta n dum shami tawt lai nna
Leviticus4:3 Namman chya hkam sai hkinjawng wa nan
Leviticus4:4 Dai usu uram hpe shawa sum chyinghka makau
Leviticus4:5 Shaloi namman chya hkam sai hkinjawng wa gaw
Leviticus4:6 sai dai hta hkinjawng wa gaw shi a layung kapruk la nhtawm
Leviticus4:7 Bai hkinjawng wa gaw
Leviticus4:8 Mahku hkungga di ai usu a sau la ai zawn
Leviticus4:9 mashi marung hta kap ai nhkyun tawng lahkawng hte dai hta kap ai sau;
Leviticus4:10 nhkyun tawng yan hte nawng sin hta kap ai sap sanap re ai usu a sau yawng la nna
Leviticus4:11 Dai usu a ahpyi
Leviticus4:12 dap shinggan na adap sa ru kau kau re ai shara asan de la sa nhtawm
Leviticus4:13 Bai Israela a shawa hpung nlang hte
Leviticus4:14 shanhte shut ai lam dan pru ai shaloi e
Leviticus4:15 Shawa hpung na agyi salang ni gaw
Leviticus4:16 Shaloi namman chya hkam ai hkinjawng wa gaw dai usu sai hpe shawa sum de la shang nna
Leviticus4:17 sai dai hta hkinjawng wa gaw shi a layung kapruk la nhtawm
Leviticus4:18 Bai hkinjawng wa gaw dai sai hta na shawa sum kata Yehowa a man na hkungri a nrung ni hta chya na rai wu ai: ngam ai asai yawng hpe gaw shawa sum chyinghka ang na wan nat hkungri a lagaw ninghpang e ru hkaw na rai wu ai.
Leviticus4:19 Dai usu a asau mahkra shi la nna
Leviticus4:20 Usu dai hpe shing di hkinjawng na rai wu ai; htingrai hkungga usu hkinjawng ai hku
Leviticus4:21 Shawng na usu hpe nat kau ai zawn
Leviticus4:22 Bai
Leviticus4:23 shi shut ai lam bai dum jang
Leviticus4:24 Dai nam la a baw hta shi a lata shi mara nna
Leviticus4:25 Shaloi hkinjawng wa gaw dai htingrai hkungga asai hpe shi a layung hte mahkai la nna
Leviticus4:26 De a asau yawng hpe shi la nna
Leviticus4:27 Yu maya masha langai ngai
Leviticus4:28 shi shut ai lam chye lu jang
Leviticus4:29 Dai htingrai hkungga a baw hta shi a lata shi mara nna wan nat hkungga sat ai shara e dai hpe sat na rai wu ai.
Leviticus4:30 Shaloi hkinjawng wa gaw de a asai hpe layung hte mahkai la nna tawn hkungri a nrung ni hta chya na rai wu ai: ngam ai asai yawng hpe gaw tawn hkungri a lagaw ninghpang e ru hkaw na rai wu ai.
Leviticus4:31 Mahku hkungga a sau la ai zawn
Leviticus4:32 Sagu kasha hte htingrai hkungga jaw mayu yang gaw ra n rawng ai ayi la sa na rai wu ai.

Leviticus5:6 dai shut kau sai mara a matu yubak raw ai hkungga di na
Leviticus5:7 Sagu kasha jaw na n lu jang gaw
Leviticus5:8 Dai hpe hkinjawng wa kaw shi la sa nna

Leviticus5:10 Bai langai mi hpe gaw tara hte maren wan nat hkungga di nna nawng ya na rai wu ai: shing rai hkinjawng wa gaw dai wa a shut ai mara matu htingrai htingrat ya yang

Leviticus5:16 shing rai chyoi pra ai lam shut hpyit tawt lai hkrup ai hte maren
Leviticus5:17 Bai masha langai ngai Yehowa hkum da ai lam lama ma galaw hkrup ai rai yang
Leviticus5:18 Dai rai yang mara raw na hkungga a matu sawn yu nna hkrat ang ai hte hte ra n rawng ai sagu la sa jaw lu na rai wu ai: ndum shami shut hpyit kau ai rai timung

Leviticus6:2 Masha langai ngai
Leviticus6:3 manang wa mat ai arai mu yang nyet la nna n teng n man dagam dala nga ai rai timung:
Leviticus6:4 shing re ai lam langai ngai galaw hkrup nna
Leviticus6:5 n teng n man ai dagam dala nga nna lu la ai arai hpa baw rai timung
Leviticus6:6 Shing rai dai wa gaw mara raw na hkungga a matu jahpu sawn nna hkrat ang ai made ging ai mara raw ai hkungga di na

Leviticus6:9 Wan hte hkungga nat nawng na tara a lam
Leviticus6:10 Hkinjawng wa gaw shi a sumpan palawng hte sumpan bu hkung bu hpun nna
Leviticus6:11 Bai hpun palawng galai kau nna wan wu dai hpe dap shinggan na san ai shara e sa sa kau na rai wu ai.
Leviticus6:12 Tawn hkungri na wan gaw n si ai sha a grung nga lu na rai nga ai: hkinjawng wa gaw jahpawt shagu hpun ju nna
Leviticus6:13 Tawn hkungri na wan gaw
Leviticus6:14 Ndai gaw shadung kumhpa a tara lam rai nga ai: Arun a shadang sha ni gaw
Leviticus6:15 Hkinjawng wa gaw dai shadung kumhpa hta na mani ai shadung latup mi
Leviticus6:16 Ngam ai hte gaw Arun hte shi a shadang sha ni sha na rai mu ai: dai hpe shawa sum kata na chyoi pra ai shara e
Leviticus6:17 Dai hpe matsi hte kabaw lu na n rai; ngai e wan hte nawng ai kumhpa ni hta na
Leviticus6:18 Yehowa hpe wan hte nawng ai hkungga ni hta na
Leviticus6:19 Bai Yehowa Mawshe hpe tsun wu ai gaw
Leviticus6:20 Arun hte shi a shadang sha ni aya dang hkam la ai shani na Yehowa hpe nawng ya ai kumhpa gaw
Leviticus6:21 Shadung dai hpe sau hte di hpyen hta gumrin kumpa nhtawm
Leviticus6:22 Arun a hkringhtawng dagraw ai kasha mung kumhpa dai jaw lu na rai nga ai: dai gaw Yehowa a matu hkum ting yawng nawng ya ai a htani htana ga matsun rai na rai malit dai.
Leviticus6:23 Hkinjawng wa a matu nawng ai shadung kumhpa rai yang gaw hkum ting yawng nat nawng kau na rai wu ai: dai hpe sha mai na n rai
Leviticus6:24 Bai Yehowa Mawshe hpe tsun wu ai gaw
Leviticus6:25 Arun hte shi a shadang sha ni hpe htingrai hkungga a lam
Leviticus6:26 dai gaw chyoi pra htum ai rai nga ai. Htingrai hkungga nawng ai hkinjawng wa gaw
Leviticus6:27 Shan dai hpe hkra ai hpa mung chyoi pra ai rai na rai nga ai: de a sai bun ai hpun palawng ni hpe mung
Leviticus6:28 Shan dai hpe shadu ai ga dibu hpe gaw agrawp kau na rai wu ai; magri di rai yang gaw
Leviticus6:29 Hkinjawng ni hta na lasha ni yawng dai mai sha na rai ma ai: dai gaw chyoi pra htum ai rai nga ai.
Leviticus6:30 Dai chyoi pra ai shara e htingrai htingrat na matu
Leviticus7:1 Da ndai gaw mara raw hkungga a tara rai nga ai: dai gaw chyoi pra htum ai rai nga ai.
Leviticus7:2 Wan nat hkungga sat ai shara e mara raw hkungga mung sat na rai wu ai; de a sai hpe tawn hkungri ntsa grup lapri bun na rai wu ai.
Leviticus7:3 De a sau yawng shi nawng ya na rai wu ai: dai nmai hta na sau
Leviticus7:4 mashi marung hta kap ai nhkyun tawng lahkawng hte dai hta kap ai sau
Leviticus7:5 hkinjawng wa gaw dai nlang hte hpe tawn hkungri hta nat nawng na rai wu ai: dai gaw mara raw hkungga rai nga ai.
Leviticus7:6 Dai hkungga shan hpe hkinjawng hta na lasha ni nlang sha mai na rai ma ai: dai hpe chyoi pra ai shara e sha na rai mu ai: dai gaw chyoi pra htum ai rai nga ai.
Leviticus7:7 Mara raw hkungga mung htingrai hkungga zawn rai nga ai rai nna tara langai sha rai nga ai: dai hte hkap htingrai htingrat ya ai hkinjawng wa gaw
Leviticus7:8 Masha wa langai ngai e sa jau ai wan nat hkungga hpe hkap nawng ya ai hkinjawng wa gaw
Leviticus7:9 Wan htung e kabaw ai shadung kumhpa rai timung
Leviticus7:10 Sau hte kayau ai shadung kumhpa rai timung
Leviticus7:11 Da ndai gaw Yehowa hpe nawng jau na mahku hkungga a tara rai nga ai.
Leviticus7:12 Chyeju dum na matu jaw ai rai jang gaw
Leviticus7:13 Dai hta kaga mahku hkungga hte seng ai chyeju dum hkungga hte rau
Leviticus7:14 Dai kumhpa amyu nlang hta na muk tawng langai langai la nhtawm Yehowa a manawt kumhpa di nna
Leviticus7:15 Bai chyeju dum na matu nawng ai mahku hkungga a shan hpe dai shani jang sha kau na rai nga ai:
Leviticus7:16 hpang jahpawt du hkra mai ngam na n rai. Rai timung ga shaka da nna jau ai
Leviticus7:17 masum ya jahpawt du hkra ngam ai ashan hpe gaw
Leviticus7:18 Rai timung dai mahku hkungga ashan hpe masum ya nhtoi hta sha ai wa gaw sharawng awng ya ai hkrum na n rai: jau ai wa mung chyeju lu la na n rai; dai gaw matsat shabat rai na ra ai rai nna
Leviticus7:19 N san n seng ai arai e hkra sai hkungga shan hpe mai sha na n rai; wan hte nat kau na rai wu ai: san seng ai ni chyu sha dai hkungga shan mai sha na rai ma ai:
Leviticus7:20 Yehowa hte seng ai mahku hkungga shan hpe n san n seng rai da ninglen sha ai wa kadai mung
Leviticus7:21 Masha hta na wu sin ai arai
Leviticus7:22 Bai Yehowa Mawshe hpe tsun wu ai gaw
Leviticus7:23 Israela a kashu kasha ni hpe ning ngu tsun u: Nanhte gaw dumsu hte sagu bainam re ai ni a sau man sha lu na myit dai n rai:
Leviticus7:24 shi hkrai si ai hte matse labye e kawa sat ai sau hpe kaga lam hta lang lu rai timung
Leviticus7:25 Kadai rai timung
Leviticus7:26 Nanhte a nga shara shagu hta awu sai
Leviticus7:27 Lama ma a sai sha hkrup ai wa gaw
Leviticus7:28 Bai Yehowa Mawshe hpe tsun wu ai gaw
Leviticus7:29 Israela kashu kasha ni hpe ning ngu tsun u: Yehowa hpe mahku hkungga jaw ai wa gaw
Leviticus7:30 Yehowa a matu wan hte nawng ai hkungga hpe shi hkum nan la sa na rai wu ai: Yehowa a man e dai sinda hpe nwat hkungga di na matu
Leviticus7:31 Shing rai hkinjawng wa gaw
Leviticus7:32 Bai mahku hkungga a hkra magyi hpe manawt hkungga a matu hkinjawng wa hpe sa ya na rai mu ai.
Leviticus7:33 Arun a shadang sha ni hta na dai mahku hkungga a asai hte sau man hpe la nawng ya ai wa gaw dai hkra magyi la na rai wu ai.

Leviticus8:25 Dai sau man nmai hta na sau

Leviticus9:1 Shing rai
Leviticus9:2 Ya nang htingrai hkungga di na matu ra n rawng ai dumsu kasha langai mi
Leviticus9:3 Bai Israela amyu masha ni hpe
Leviticus9:4 Yehowa a man e mahku hkungga di na matu usu langai mi
Leviticus9:5 Mawshe htet da ai arai ni dai shawa sum a man e shanhte la sa nna
Leviticus9:6 Shaloi Mawshe gaw
Leviticus9:7 Bai Mawshe gaw Arun hpe
Leviticus9:8 Shing rai Arun gaw tawn hkungri de sit sa nna
Leviticus9:9 Arun a shadang sha ni mung
Leviticus9:10 htingrai hkungga sau man hte nhkyun sin hta kap ai sap sanap re ai ni hpe tawn hkungri hta nat wu ai: dai gaw Yehowa Mawshe hpe hkang da ai hku rai nga ai.
Leviticus9:11 Ashan hte ahpyi gaw dap shinggan e nat kau wu ai.
Leviticus9:12 Wan nat hkungga mung sat nhtawm
Leviticus9:13 Bai shanhte gaw wan nat hkungga a shan tau ni hte abaw wa ya mu ai rai nna
Leviticus9:14 Pu sin ni hte lagaw ni hpe mung lajang kashin nna
Leviticus9:15 Bai shawa masha ni a kumhpa shi la ya ai hte
Leviticus9:16 Dai wan nat hkungga mung shi dun la nna
Leviticus9:17 Shadung kumhpa mung shi la nna
Leviticus9:18 Amyu masha ni a matu mahku hkungga usu hte sagu la hpe mung la sat nhtawm
Leviticus9:19 nmai sau hte pu kan magap ai sau
Leviticus9:20 singda shan ntsa e mara nna tawn hkungri hta nat wu ai:
Leviticus9:21 sinda hte hkra magyi hpe Arun gaw Yehowa a man e nwat hkungga di nna nwat wu ai: shing di galaw ai mung Mawshe tsun da ai hku rai nga ai.
Leviticus9:22 Shaloi Arun gaw shi a lata shawa masha ni hpang de sharawt let shanhte hpe shaman ya nhtawm htingrai hkungga
Leviticus9:23 Bai Mawshe yan Arun gaw shawa sum kata de shang nna pru wa nhtawm
Leviticus9:24 Yehowa kaw na wan pru nna tawn hkungri na wan nat hkungga hte sau man ni hpe hkru kau wu ai: shing rai byin wa ai hpe amyu masha ni mu jang

Leviticus10:4 Bai Mawshe gaw
Leviticus10:5 Shan mung sit sa nna
Leviticus10:6 Bai Mawshe gaw Arun hte shi a shadang sha Eleaza yan Ihtama hpe
Leviticus10:7 Nanhte n si wa myit ga
Leviticus10:8 Bai Yehowa gaw Arun hpe
Leviticus10:9 si ai n hkrum na hte
Leviticus10:10 Mawshe a n-gup hta Yehowa hkang da ai tara matsun yawng hpe
Leviticus10:11 nanhte dai shawa sum kata de shang ai shaloi tsabyi jahku hte nang ai baw hpa mung hkum lu myit: dai gaw nanhte a shu mashi shu masha prat dingsa hkan nga lu na matsun maroi rai nga malit dai.
Leviticus10:12 Bai Mawshe gaw Arun hte shi hta ngam ai kasha Eleaza yan Ihtama hte hpe
Leviticus10:13 dai gaw chyoi pra htum ai rai nga ai: dai kumhpa gaw Yehowa hpe wan hte nawng ai kumhpa ni hta na nang hte na a shadang sha ni lu la ging ai kumhtaw rai malit dai majaw
Leviticus10:14 Dai nwat sinda hte manawt magyi hpe chyawm gaw
Leviticus10:15 Wan hta nawng na sau man hkungga ni hte rau
Leviticus10:16 Ya Mawshe gaw htingrai hkungga di na bainam tam shaja nga ai
Leviticus10:17 “Htingrai hkungga shan ngu ai gaw
Leviticus10:18 De a sai mung chyoi pra ai shara kata de n shawn myit hka; ngai hkang da sai hte maren chyoi pra ai shara e dai hkungga shan teng teng sha lu mai myit dai
Leviticus10:19 Shaloi Arun gaw
Leviticus10:20 Mawshe mung dai na jang shi a myit yin la wu ai.
Leviticus11:1 Bai Yehowa Mawshe yan Arun hpe tsun wau ai gaw
Leviticus11:2 Israela kashu kasha ni hpe ning ngu tsun mu: Ga ntsa na hkrung nga ai ashu ashan danghta hta na nanhte sha mai ai gaw
Leviticus11:3 lahkru ga nna shat lai lai ai ashu ashan yawng gaw nanhte sha lu na rai myit dai
Leviticus11:4 Rai timung shat lai lai ai hte lahkru ga ai hta na nanhte n sha mai ai hte gaw ndai rai nga ai: Gawla-uk gaw shat lai lai timung lahkru n ga ai majaw nanhte a matu n san n seng malit dai.
Leviticus11:5 Shahpan gaw shat lai lai timung lahkru n ga ai majaw nanhte hta n san n seng rai nga ai.
Leviticus11:6 Prangtai gaw shat lai lai timung
Leviticus11:7 Awa gaw lahkru ga timung shat lai n lai ai majaw nanhte hta n san n seng rai nga ai.
Leviticus11:8 Shing re ai dusat amyu a ashan gaw nanhte sha mai na nrai; de a si mang hpe mung hkra mai na n rai; dai ni gaw nanhte hta n san n seng ai rai nga ai.
Leviticus11:9 Nammukdara hka hte hka nawng hka nu re ai ni hta nga ai hka nga amyu danghta hta na rai yang singgung
Leviticus11:10 Singgung hte asep n tu ai nammukdara hka hte hka nawng hka nu re ai ni hta byau nga ai hkrung ai baw yawng hte gaw nanhte hta matsat shabat rai nga malit dai:
Leviticus11:11 shing re ai baw a shan nanhte matsat kau na rai myit dai; mai sha na n rai
Leviticus11:12 Hka hta rawng ai singgung asep n hkum ai hpa baw rai timung
Leviticus11:13 Nanhte matsat mai ai
Leviticus11:14 lang mut
Leviticus11:15 u hka amyu yawng;
Leviticus11:16 u gawla-uk
Leviticus11:17 langji amyu myu;
Leviticus11:18 du du di di
Leviticus11:19 u langang
Leviticus11:20 Singkaw tu nhtawm lagaw mali hte hkawm ai baw amyu yawng hpe nanhte matsat na rai myit dai.
Leviticus11:21 Rai timung
Leviticus11:22 dinggam-yaw
Leviticus11:23 Rai timung singkaw tu nhtawm lagaw mali tu ai amyu yawng hpe nanhte matsat na rai myit dai.
Leviticus11:24 Dai baw dusat amyu a majaw nanhte n san n seng rai na malit dai: dai ni a si mang hkra ai wa kadai mung shana de du hkra n san n seng rai nga ai.
Leviticus11:25 Dai si mang sa la kau ai wa mung shi a hpun palawng hkrut kau na rai wu ai: shana de du hkra mung naw n seng nga ai.
Leviticus11:26 Lahkru n ga ai ashan yamnga hte shat lai n lai ai shan yamnga ni gaw nanhte hta n san n seng rai nga ai: dai ni a si mang hkra ai ni mung n san n seng rai nga ai.
Leviticus11:27 Lagaw mali tu ai hta na lahpan hte hkawm ai ashu ashan amyu shagu gaw nanhte hta n san n seng rai nga ai: dai baw si mang hkra ai wa mung shana de du hkra n san n seng rai nga ai.
Leviticus11:28 De a si mang htawm kau ai wa gaw shi a hpun palawng hkrut kau na rai wu ai; shana de du hkra mung n san n seng rai nga ai: dai baw amyu ni gaw nanhte hta n san n seng rai nga ai.
Leviticus11:29 Ga ntsa e gumrawt hkawm ai dusat amyu ni hta na nanhte matsat mai ai baw ndai ni rai nga ai:
Leviticus11:30 malat
Leviticus11:31 Dai hte gaw gumrawt hkawm ai baw hta na matsat hpa rai ni rai nga ai: dai ni a si mang hkra ai wa mung shana de du hkra n san n seng rai nga ai.
Leviticus11:32 Dai baw si mang hpun ban hkan
Leviticus11:33 Ga wan langai ngai hta dai si mang hkrat hkra yang
Leviticus11:34 Shahpa shatmai hta dai wan na ntsin hkrat bun yang
Leviticus11:35 
Leviticus11:36 Rai timung

Leviticus11:38 Rai timung hka hta tsing sai nli hta hkrat hkra yang chyawm gaw
Leviticus11:39 Nanhte sha mai ai dusat hta na shi chyu si ai rai yang
Leviticus11:40 Si mang dai sha ai wa mung
Leviticus11:41 Ga ntsa e gumrawt nna
Leviticus11:42 Lagaw n tu ai

Leviticus15:2

Leviticus15:4 Shi yup ai yup ra mung n san n seng nga ai; hpa hta dung ai rai timung n san n seng rai nga ai.
Leviticus15:5 Shi a yup ra hkra ai wa kadai mung tinang a hpun palawng hkrut nna
Leviticus15:6 Ari ri ai wa dung ai hkang sa dung ai wa mung
Leviticus15:7 Shi hpe hkra ai wa mung hpun palawng hkrut nna hka shin na rai wu ai; shana de du hkra mung n san n seng rai nga ai.
Leviticus15:8 San seng ai wa hta shi a mayen hkra yang
Leviticus15:9 Ari ri ai wa jawn ai hpa baw hking mung n san n seng rai nga ai.
Leviticus15:10 Shi a npu e taw ai rai hkra ai wa mung shana de du hkra n san n seng rai nga ai: dai arai ni hpe hpai ai wa mung hpun palawng hkrut kau nna hka shin na rai wu ai; shana de du hkra mung n san n seng rai nga ai.
Leviticus15:11 Ari ri ai wa lata n shin ai hte masha kaga hpe ahtawk yang
Leviticus15:12 Ari ri ai wa hkra ai ga di mung agrawp kau na rai wu ai: hpun hte galaw ai rai
Leviticus15:13 Ari ri ai wa ari mai yang
Leviticus15:14 Matsat ya nhtoi e dai wa gaw hkrudu lahkawng
Leviticus15:15 kinjawng wa mung htingrai hkungga a matu langai mi
Leviticus15:16 Lasha langai ngai azu tung yang hkum ting hka shin kau na rai wu ai: shana de du hkra mung n san n seng rai nga ai:
Leviticus15:17 azu hkra ai hpun palawng hte shanhpyi arai hpa mung hkrut kau na rai wu ai; shana de du hkra mung n san n seng na rai nga ai.
Leviticus15:18 Shing re ai lasha hte numsha nga sha ma ai rai yang
Leviticus15:19 Numsha gaw num hking lang ai rai yang
Leviticus15:20 Num hking lang nna n san n seng ai hte yup nga ai hpa hta mung n san n seng rai nga ai; dung ai hpa hta mung n san n seng rai nga ai.
Leviticus15:21 Shi a yup ra hkra ai wa kadai mung tinang a hpun palawng hkrut nna hka shin kau na rai wu ai; shana de du hkra mung n san n seng rai nga ai.

Leviticus16:1 Arun a shadang sha yan Yehowa man de sit sa nna si mat ai hpang
Leviticus16:2 Na nhpu Arun si ai n hkrum u ga

Leviticus16:4 Dai chyoi pra ai sumpan palawng
Leviticus16:5 Bai
Leviticus16:6 Shing rai Arun gaw shi hte seng ai
Leviticus16:7 Bai dai nam la lahkawng mung
Leviticus16:8 Bai Arun gaw dai bainam lahkawng hpe
Leviticus16:9 Shing rai Arun gaw
Leviticus16:10 Dat kau na ang ai bainam hpe gaw Yehowa a man e ahkrung nawng nna
Leviticus16:11 Bai Arun gaw shi hte seng ai htingrai hkungga a usu la tawn nna
Leviticus16:12 Bai shi gaw Yehowa a man e nga ai tawn hkungri na grung ai wan n-ga wan ban hta jahpring la nhtawm
Leviticus16:13 Shaloi
Leviticus16:14 Usu sai mung la nna chyeju magap a sinpraw maga hpe layung hte lapri na rai wu ai: dai chyeju magap a man e mung shi a layung hte sanit lang lapri na rai wu ai.
Leviticus16:15 Dai hpang amyu masha ni hte seng ai htingrai hkungga bainam sat nna
Leviticus16:16 Shing rai Israela a kashu kasha ni a n san n seng ai hte tara tawt lai ai yubak mara yawng a majaw

Leviticus16:18 Bai Yehowa man na tawn hkungri de pru nna
Leviticus16:19 Dai tawn hkungri a ntsa e mung
Leviticus16:20 Shing rai chyoi pra ai shara a matu
Leviticus16:21 Arun gaw dai bainam hkrung a baw hta shi a lata lahkawng maga mara let Israela a kashu kasha ni a n hkru n hkra ai hte tara tawt lai ai yubak yawng mayawng tawngban nna dai bainam baw hta mara da nhtawm san da ai masha a lata hte nam mali de gawt kau shangun na rai wu ai:
Leviticus16:22 bainam dai gaw shanhte a yubak nlang katsi katsang re ai shara de gun mat wa ya na rai nna
Leviticus16:23 Bai Arun gaw shawa sum kata de shang nna
Leviticus16:24 ning rai chyoi pra ai shara langai mi hta shi hka shin kau nna
Leviticus16:25 Htingrai hkungga sau man hpe mung
Leviticus16:26 Nam mali de bainam sa dat kau ai wa mung shi a hpun palawng hkrut nna hka shin na rai wu ai; shing rai nna she dap hta shang na rai wu ai.
Leviticus16:27 Chyoi Pra ai shara e htingrai htingrat na matu la shawn ai asai a htingrai hkungga usu hkum hpe mung
Leviticus16:28 Dai sa nat kau ai wa mung
Leviticus16:29 Nanhte tutnawng hkan nga na matsun ndai rai nga ai: nanhte hkum nan rai timung
