1Kings5:1 Ya Turu hkawhkam Hiram gaw shi a shangun ma ni hpe Shawlumon hpang de shangun dat wu ai; kaning rai nme law
1Kings5:2 Shaloi Shawlumon gaw Hiram hpang de shangun dat nna
1Kings5:3 “Nye wa Dawi gaw
1Kings5:4 Ya chyawm nye a Karai Kasang Yehowa gaw shara shagu hkan e ngai hpe ngwipyaw shangun ya ai
1Kings5:5 Dai re ai majaw
1Kings5:6 Dai rai yang
1Kings5:7 Ya Hiram gaw Shawlumon a ga na wu ai shaloi e ja ja kabu nga nna
1Kings5:8 Bai Hiram gaw Shawlumon hpang de masha shangun nna
1Kings5:9 Nye shangun ma ni gaw Lebanon bum ga nna nammukdara du hkra dai mailung ni hpe karawt la nna
1Kings5:10 Shing rai Hiram gaw Shawlumon ra ai hte maren
1Kings5:11 Shawlumon mung Hiram a hkaw na ni a matu hkaulan mam dang mun lahkawng
1Kings5:12 Bai Yehowa gaw ga ndat tawn da ai hte maren Shawlumon hpe hpaji byeng-ya jaw wu ai; Hiram yan Shawlumon gaw shada hkau chyap nga nna
1Kings5:13 Ya hkawhkam Shawlumon gaw Israela amyu masha yawng hta na
1Kings5:14 shi shanhte hpe Lebanon bum ga de shata mi hta marai mun mun shangun dat mu ai: shanhte gaw Lebanon bum ga de shata mi
1Kings5:15 Bai Shawlumon gaw lit gun hpai ai ni mun sanit
1Kings5:16 shi a amu up ai agyi ni a ntsa e up nga ai hpareng ni gaw hkying masum e masum tsa rai nga ma ai.
1Kings5:17 Hkawhkam wa htet da ai hte maren dai nta a npawt nhpang hpe tawk la ai nlung hte gaw da na matu
1Kings5:18 Shing rai Shawlumon a amu galaw ai ni mung
1Kings6:1 Israela masha ni gaw Egutu mung nna pru wa ai mali tsa matsat shi ning shaning e
1Kings6:2 Hkawhkam Shawlumon gaw Yehowa a matu gaw da ai nta gaw
1Kings6:3 Dai nta a htingnu gawk na ajan gaw
1Kings6:4 Nta matu pat tawn ai hkuwawt awa mung shachyaw wu ai.
1Kings6:5 Bai nta shakum grup yin e
1Kings6:6 Lawu htap gaw nda de dawng manga
1Kings6:7 Dai nta hpe gaw shachyaw yang
1Kings6:8 Nta ajan ka-ang gawk ni a matu shang wa ai chyinghka lam gaw nta a hkra maga de waw nga ai; bai manai ai lakang hte lapran htap ngu na de shanhte lung wa nna
1Kings6:9 Shing rai shi gaw dai nta hpe gaw da shangut lu ai; arit hpunpyen hte mung dai hpe magap da wu ai.
1Kings6:10 Dai nta makau na htap gawk ni hpe langai mi a tsaw de dawng manga nga
1Kings6:11 Shaloi Yehowa a ga Shawlumon hpang de du nna
1Kings6:12 “Ya nang gap da ai nta a lam gaw
1Kings6:13 Ngai gaw Israela kashu kasha ni hte rau nga nga nna
1Kings6:14 Shing rai Shawlumon gaw dai nta hpe gaw shangut da wu ai.
1Kings6:15 Shi gaw nta shakum kata maga de arit hpunpyen hte magap da wu ai; madang kaw nna magaw du hkra nhku maga de hpunpyen hte shangut da wu ai: nta hpe marau hpunpyen hte nep da wu ai.
1Kings6:16 Chyoi pra htum ai shara ngu ai shingran gawk a matu
1Kings6:17 Shingran gawk n lawm ai sha
1Kings6:18 Nta nhku maga de gaw tauba si sumla hte nampan pu sumla ni ka hkrep ai arit hpunpyen hte kum da wu ai: yawng gaw arit hpunpyen hkrai rai nga ai; hpa nlung mung n mu lu ai.
1Kings6:19 Yehowa sakse sumpu tawn da na matu
1Kings6:20 Shingran gawk gaw
1Kings6:21 Shing rai Shawlumon gaw nta nhku maga de ja jet hte sup wu ai; shingran gawk a npan e mung ja saidawng dun grang nna
1Kings6:22 Nta ting ngut hkra ja hte sup nga ai; shingran gawk hte seng a hkungri ting hta mung ja hte sup wu ai.
1Kings6:23 Shingran gawk kata e
1Kings6:24 Dai Hkerubim yan a singkaw gaw maga mi hte maga mi dawng manga nga rai malu ai: singkaw matu maga mi kaw nna maga mi du hkra dawng shi rai nga ai.
1Kings6:25 Kaga ngu na Hkerubim mung dawng shi rai nga ai; dai Hkerubim yan gaw hkrang bung nna
1Kings6:26 Dai Hkerubim langai mi a tsaw de gaw dawng shi
1Kings6:27 Dai Hkerubim yan hpe shingram gawk kata e shadun da nhtawm
1Kings6:28 Dai Hkerubim yan hpe mung ja hte sup wu ai.
1Kings6:29 Bai
1Kings6:30 Nta a kata gawk hte shinggan gawk a htingnep hpe mung ja hte sup wu ai.
1Kings6:31 Shingran gawk chyinghka lam matu
1Kings6:32 Shing rai tsanlun hpun hte shi chyinghka man mi galaw nna
1Kings6:33 Dai hte maren Htingnu gawk ngu ai chyinghka lam a matu
1Kings6:34 chyinghka man mi marau hpun hte mung shachyaw wu ai; man mi hte man mi katsu mai ai chyinghka rai nga ai.
1Kings6:35 Dai hta mung Hkerubim sumla
1Kings6:36 Bai kata ngu na wang gaw tawk la ai nlung htap masum hte
1Kings6:37 Hkaw dung ai mali ning e Ziwa shata hta
1Kings6:38 Shi langai ning na
1Kings7:1 Bai Shawlumon gaw shi a Htingnu hpe shi masum ning tup galaw nna
1Kings7:2 Shi gaw Lebanon maling na Htingnu hpe galaw wu ai: de a galu de dawng latsa
1Kings7:3 Shadaw ni hta htinggrang nga ai dingbat mali shi manga a ntsa e a rit hpunpyen ni nep da wu ai; yan mi hte yan mi shi manga rai nga ai.
1Kings7:4 Dingbat yan masum rai nga ai hte
1Kings7:5 Chyinghka ni hte shadaw ni yawng gaw hpunpyen hte man mali maren di mu ai; hkuwawt hku ni mung htap masum maren htawnglawng rai nga ai.
1Kings7:6 Bai shi gaw shadaw ajan hpe galaw wu ai; de a galu de dawng manga shi
1Kings7:7 Tara dara na ajan ngu ai
1Kings7:8 Dai ajan nhku de na wang kata de nga ai: shi rawng nga na htingnu hpe dai hte maren galaw wu ai: Shawlumon hkungran la ai Hpara-u a shayi sha matu mung
1Kings7:9 Ndai nta ni yawng
1Kings7:10 De a npawt nhpang gaw
1Kings7:11 Ntsa de mung
1Kings7:12 Grup yin na wang kaba mung tawk la ai nlung mung
1Kings7:13 Bai hkawhkam Shawlumon gaw shangun nna
1Kings7:14 Dai wa gaw Naphtali amyu na gaida jan a kasha rai nga nna
1Kings7:15 Dai wa gaw
1Kings7:16 Bai shadaw yan a ntsa e shadun na matu dawng manga nga re ai magri bandung lahkawng mung jaw wu ai.
1Kings7:17 Bai shadaw yan a ntsa e shadun ai bandung ni a matu
1Kings7:18 Shing rai dai shadaw yan hpe shi galaw wu ai: hkainu si zawn re ai magri sumbaw mung galaw nna
1Kings7:19 Bai
1Kings7:20 Shadaw matu yan hta sumgawn awa hte kayep ai sumpawm ntsa e bandung dun nna
1Kings7:21 Bai dai shadaw yan hpe nawku Htingnu a ajan e shadun wu ai: hkra maga na shadaw hpe shadun nna
1Kings7:22 Shadaw matu hta hkalaw pan sumla hte sumli wu ai: shing rai shadaw ni a amu ngut wa sai.
1Kings7:23 Bai magri hka lawng hpe shajaw wu ai: de a nda de dawng shi
1Kings7:24 De a mahka grup yin lawu e nampan majawm lam lahkawng jaw nna
1Kings7:25 Dai hka lawng gaw usu shi lahkawng a ntsa e dung nga ai: masum gaw dingdung maga de
1Kings7:26 Dai gaw lahpa mi tup htat nga ai; de a mahka gaw hkawan mahka zawn rai nna
1Kings7:27 Bai
1Kings7:28 Punghkum ni gaw ning rai nga ai: hpunpyen pa ni rai nga ai hte mahku grup yin e hpunpyen kaji hte hkawp nhtawm
1Kings7:29 Hkawp ai hpunpyen kaji ni a ntsa e mung dai hte maren rai nga ai; hkanghkyi
1Kings7:30 Punghkum langai hte langai magri leng dingsen mali hte magri htinggrang rawng nna
1Kings7:31 Dai angdung mahka gaw punghkum shakau ai hta dawng mi
1Kings7:32 Dai leng dingsen mali gaw punghkum njut npu e shachyai nna; htinggrang ni gaw kra nga ai lagaw mali hta kap nga ai: leng dingsen langai mi gaw dawng me lahkam mi tsaw nga ai.
1Kings7:33 Leng dingsen ni gaw hpyen leng dingsen hte bung nna
1Kings7:34 Punghkum a jut mali hta kra nga ai lagaw mali mung rai nga ai; dai ni gaw punghkum hte langai sha di nna jaw wu ai.
1Kings7:35 Bai punghkum ni a matu e lahkam mi sung ai shingwang rai nga ai; dai matu grup yin e shingkawng ni hte hpun pa ni gaw langai sha rai nga ai.
1Kings7:36 Dai shingkawng ni hte hpun pa ni hta grup yin e shang ai hte maren Hkerubim
1Kings7:37 Dai lam hkan nna dai punghkum shi hpe galaw da wu ai: langai hte langai gaw
1Kings7:38 Bai shi gaw magri angdung shi jaw wu ai: angdung langai mi gaw ntsin bat mali shi shang lu ai; langai hte langai gaw dawng mali kaba nga ai; punghkum langai mi a ntsa e angdung langai mi dai shi gu hkra
1Kings7:39 Bai dai punghkum ni gaw nawku Htingnu a hkra de manga
1Kings7:40 Bai Hiram gaw ntsin htung ni
1Kings7:41 dai shadaw lahkawng hpe mung; dai shadaw ni a ntsa na bandung na hkawan lahkawng hpe mung; dai shadaw ni a ntsa na bandung na hkawan lahkawng hpe mawn sumli na matu sumgawn awa hpe mung;
1Kings7:42 dai shadaw ni a ntsa na bandung na hkawan lahkawng hpe mawn sumli ai sumgawn awa hpe magap na matu
1Kings7:43 punghkum shi hte de a ntsa na angdung shi hpe mung;
1Kings7:44 magri hka lawng hte
1Kings7:45 dibu ni
1Kings7:46 Hkawhkam wa gaw dai arai ni hpe Yawdan layang ga na
1Kings7:47 Dai arai ni gaw nachying law ai majaw Shawlumon gaw n shen ai tawn da wu ai; dai magri gaw joi gade re ai
1Kings7:48 Bai Shawlumon gaw
1Kings7:49 pyengdin shadun ni
1Kings7:50 hka wan ni
1Kings7:51 Shing rai hkawhkam Shawlumon gaw Yehowa a nta hta galaw ai yawng mayawng hte hpe shangut wu ai. Bai Shawlumon gaw shi a kawa Dawi madat da ai aja gumhpraw hte arai yawng mayawng hte hpe shapraw nna
1Kings8:1 Shaloi Shawlumon gaw
1Kings8:2 Shing rai Israela masha ni yawng hte gaw
1Kings8:3 Israela agyi salang ni yawng sa du nna
1Kings8:4 Shanhte gaw Yehowa a sumpu hpe mung
1Kings8:5 Hkawhkam Shawlumon hte rau zuphpawng nga ai Israela wunawng wuwa ting
1Kings8:6 Hkinjawng ni gaw Yehowa a ga shaka sumpu hpe
1Kings8:7 Kaning rai nme law
1Kings8:8 Kandang a matu ni gaw shingran gawk a npan e nga ai chyoi pra ai shara hta mu lu hkra galu nga ai: shinggan de chyawm gaw n kra nga ai; dai de gaw dai ni du hkra anga nga ai.
1Kings8:9 Israela masha ni gaw Egutu mung na pru wa nna
1Kings8:10 Ya hkinjawng ni gaw dai chyoi pra ai shara kaw na pru wa ma yang
1Kings8:11 hkinjawng ni gaw dai sumwi a majaw tinang a daw jau ai amu ni hpe n galaw lu mu ai: kaning rai nme law
1Kings8:12 Shaloi Shawlumon gaw
1Kings8:13 Gaja wa ngai gaw
1Kings8:14 Bai hkawhkam wa gaw myi man kayin nna
1Kings8:15 Bai shi gaw
1Kings8:16 nga nna nye wa Dawi hpe n-gup ga hte tsun nhtawm shi a lata hte ga dai hpe shadik ya ai Israela Karai Kasang Yehowa gaw
1Kings8:17 “Ya
1Kings8:18 Nang nye a amying nsang matu nta galaw da na
1Kings8:19 rai timung nang dai nta hpe gaw da lu na n rai; na nshang nna hkrat ai na nsha gaw
1Kings8:20 Yehowa mung shi tsun da ai ga hpe shadik nu ai: “ngai wa gaw nye wa Dawi a malai paw pru nna
1Kings8:21 Dai nhku e mung
1Kings8:22 Shing rai Shawlumon gaw Yehowa a tawn hkungri hte Israela masha ni a wunawng wuwa ting a man e tsap nga nna
1Kings8:23 “Israela Karai Kasang Yehowa e
1Kings8:24 na shangun ma
1Kings8:25 Dai rai nna
1Kings8:26 Rai sa
1Kings8:27 “Karai Kasang gaw ga ning tsa e gaja wa teng teng shanu nga lu na kun? Yu u
1Kings8:28 Rai timung
1Kings8:29 Nye a amying ningsang dai yang e anga nga na ra ai
1Kings8:30 Na a mayam wa
1Kings8:31 “Masha langai ngai tinang htingbu wa hpe shut nna
1Kings8:32 nang gaw sumsing lamu hta e madat mara la nna
1Kings8:33 “Na a amyu Israela gaw nang hpe shut kau ai majaw
1Kings8:34 nang gaw sumsing lamu hta e madat mara ya nna
1Kings8:35 “Nang hpe shut ai mara majaw marang n htu nna jan gri nga yang
1Kings8:36 nang gaw sumsing lamu hta e madat mara ya nna
1Kings8:37 “Dai mungdan hta n-gawn hku wa wa ai
1Kings8:38 marai langai ngai
1Kings8:39 nang gaw sumsing lamu e nga ai
1Kings8:40 Shing rai
1Kings8:41 “Dai hta n-ga
1Kings8:42 na amyu nsang majaw sumtsan mung na pru ai masha tsasam wa gaw
1Kings8:43 na amyu Israela gaw na amying hpe chye nna hkrit hkungga nga ai hte
1Kings8:44 “Na amyu masha ni gaw hpyen ni hpe sa gasat nga ma yang
1Kings8:45 nang gaw sumsing lamu hta e shanhte a hpyi nem ai hte tawngban ga hpe madat mara ya nna
1Kings8:46 “Masha kadai mung yubak n galaw ai n nga ai majaw
1Kings8:47 shanhte bawng wa dung nga ai ga hta myit dum myit hprang nna
1Kings8:48 bawng dung nga ma ai ga hta myit masin mahkra hte kraw lawang mahkra hte nang hpang de kayin wa nna
1Kings8:49 shaloi jang
1Kings8:50 nang hpe shut hpyit ai
1Kings8:51 kaning rai nme law
1Kings8:52 Shing rai
1Kings8:53 “Madu du Yehowa e
1Kings8:54 Shing rai Shawlumon gaw Yehowa hpe akyu hpyi tawngban ga mahkra shangut nhtawm
1Kings8:55 Israela wunawng wuwa ting hpe nsen kaba hte shaman ya nna
1Kings8:56 “Shi a amyu Israela hpe
1Kings8:57 Anhte a Karai Kasang Yehowa gaw ji wa ni hte rau nga nga ai hte maren
1Kings8:58 Shi a lam yawng hpe hkan nang let
1Kings8:59 Yehowa gaw Karai Kasang rai nga ai hte shi hta shaje kaga n nga ai
1Kings8:60 ngai Yehowa hpe hpyi nem tawngban ai ga gaw
1Kings8:61 Dai re ai majaw

1Kings8:63 Shawlumon gaw Yehowa hpe mahku hkungga matu

1Kings8:65 Shing rai Shawlumon gaw
1Kings8:66 Matsat ya ngu ai nhtoi hta e shi gaw mung masha ni hpe shabawn dat mu ai; shanhte mung hkawhkam wa hpe shaman ya let

1Kings9:12 Shing rai Hiram gaw
1Kings9:13 “Hpu e

1Kings9:16 Egutu hkawhkam Hpara-u gaw lung wa nna Gezera mare hpe gasat la nhtawm

1Kings10:1 Ya Sheba hkawhkam jan gaw
1Kings10:2 Shi gaw Yerusalem mare de hkan pawp hkan nang ai wunawng wuwa kaba ni hte
1Kings10:3 Shawlumon gaw
1Kings10:4 Sheba hkawhkam jan gaw
1Kings10:5 shi a sha ku na lu sha shahpa hpe mung
1Kings10:6 shi gaw
1Kings10:7 Rai timung
1Kings10:8 Na a man e tutnawng tsap nga nna
1Kings10:9 Nang hta sharawng awng nna
1Kings10:10 ngu nna hkawhkam wa hpe tsun let
1Kings10:11 Ohpira mung na aja htaw ya ai Hiram a sanghpaw li ni mung
1Kings10:12 Hkawhkam wa gaw almuga mailung ni hte
1Kings10:13 Bai hkawhkam Shawlumon gaw Sheba hkawhkam jan hpe shi a hkawhkam sutdek hta na jaw ya ai hta kaga
1Kings10:14 Shawlumon gaw laning mi hta lu la ai aja shen yu yang
1Kings10:15 dai hta kaga
1Kings10:16 Bai hkawhkam Shawlumon gaw n-gang kaba ni tsa aja hte dup wu ai: n-gang langai mi hta aja shekela kru tsa rawng lu ai.
1Kings10:17 Bai shi gaw n-gang kaji masum tsa aja hte dup wu ai: n-gang langai mi hta aja joi mi rawng lu ai: hkawhkam wa gaw dai ni hpe Lebanon maling na nta kata e tawn da wu ai.
1Kings10:18 Dai hta kaga hkawhkam wa gaw hkawhkam tingnyang kaba magwi kawng hte galaw nna
1Kings10:19 Tingnyang de lung wa na matu lakang n-gam kru rai nga nna
1Kings10:20 N-gum kru a maga mi hte maga mi yawng hpawn hkanghkyi shi lahkawng tsap nga ma ai: dai zawn re ai gaw gara mungdan hta mung n galaw yu ma ai.
1Kings10:21 Hkawhkam Shawlumon ntsin lu ai gawm ni yawng aja rai nga ai; Lebanon maling a nta na wan ni yawng mung ja jet rai nga lu ai: langai mi muk gumhpraw n rai nga ai; Shawlumon a aprat e gumhpraw hpe hpa n nawn nga ai.
1Kings10:22 Kaning rai nme law
1Kings10:23 Shing rai hkawhkam Shawlumon gaw
1Kings10:24 Karai Kasang gaw Shawlumon a myit masin hta bang ya ai hpaji byeng-ya hpe na lu na matu
1Kings10:25 Shanhte langai hte langai gumhpraw wan ni
1Kings10:26 Bai Shawlumon gaw gumra leng ni hte gumra jawn ai ni hpe lahkawn la mu ai: shi gaw leng kying mi mali tsa hte gumra jawn ai ni mun me hkying lahkawng lu nna
1Kings10:27 Bai hkawhkam wa gaw Yerusalem mare hta e gumhpraw hpe nlung zawn
1Kings10:28 Shawlumon rem la ai gumra ni gaw Egutu mung na pru nna hkawhkam a hpaga ga ai ni hpung mi hte hpung mi manu sawn nna mari la mu ai.
1Kings10:29 Egutu mung na gumra leng langai mi gaw gumhpraw shekela kru tsa

1Kings12:1 Ya Rehoboam gaw Shehkem mare de lung wa sai; kaning rai nme law
1Kings12:2 Ya Nebat a kasha Yeroboam gaw hkawhkam Shawlumon kaw na hprawng wa nna
1Kings12:3 shanhte gaw shi hpe shaga la nna
1Kings12:4 “Na nwa gaw anhte a kandang hpe li wa shangun ya mi ai: dai re ai majaw na nwa a yak la ai amu makan hte anhte hpe
1Kings12:5 Shaloi shi gaw
1Kings12:6 Ya hkawhkam Rehoboam gaw shi kawa Shawlumon a prat e shi a man e tsap nga ai salang ni hte bawng yu nna
1Kings12:7 Shanhte gaw
1Kings12:8 Shi chyawm gaw
1Kings12:9 “Ndai masha ni gaw
1Kings12:10 Shaloi shi hte rau kaba wa ai shabrang ni gaw
1Kings12:11 nye wa gaw nanhte hpe li la ai kandang shagun da timung
1Kings12:12 Shing rai hkawhkam wa gaw
1Kings12:13 Hkawhkam wa gaw mung masha ni hpe sheng mareng ga tsun nna
1Kings12:14 shabrang ni shi hpe hpaji daw ya ai ga hku hkan nna
1Kings12:15 Shing rai hkawhkam wa gaw mung masha ni a ga n madat nga ai: dai lam gaw
1Kings12:16 Hkawhkam wa gaw shanhte a ga n madat nga ai hpe
1Kings12:17 Rai timung

1Chronicles10:1 Ya Hpilisti masha ni Israela masha ni hpe gasat mu ai: Israela masha ni mahtang masha hpyen ni a man e hprawng nna Gilaboa bum ga hkan e hkala nba hkrum ai hte si shajang ma ai.
1Chronicles10:2 Hpilisti masha ni mung Shawlu hte shi a kasha ni hpe htep lahti hkan shachyut nna
1Chronicles10:3 Shing rai dai gasat gala ai gaw
1Chronicles10:4 Dai rai nna Shawlu gaw shi a ri nhtu gun hpai ai wa hpe
1Chronicles10:5 Ri nhtu lang ai wa mung

1Chronicles11:22 Bai Kabzela shara na

1Chronicles11:24 Dai amu hte hpe Yehoiada kasha Benaia galaw wu ai rai nna

Job21:11 Shanhte a kasha ni gaw sagu hpung zawn law wa nna
Job21:12 Shanhte gaw shupsheng hte tingse dum let mahkawn mangoi nna
Job21:13 Tinang a aprat hpe
Job21:14 Shanhte gaw Karai Wa hpe
Job21:15 N-gun chyalai rawng ai wa kaw yam na
Job21:16 Rai timung
Job21:17 Tara n lang ai wa a pyengdin si mat nna
Job21:18 nbung a man e yi hku zawn shanhte tai mat ai hte
Job21:19 Karai Wa gaw shanhte a kasha ni a matu ari mahkawng da a hka! Shi hpe matai htang ai hte shadum nga u ga;
Job21:20 Shi hten byak hkrum ai hpe shi myi nan mu lu nna
Job21:21 Shi nga lu ai shaning shata ni gu lu yang
Job21:22 Matsaw ntsang na ni hpe dawdan ya ai Karai Wa hpe chye chyang ai lam
Job21:23 Marai langai mi gaw n-gun lagaw an nna
Job21:24 Shi a nhtung ni nga chyu hte hpring nga nna
Job21:25 Bai langai mi gaw
Job21:26 Shan lahkawng gaw ga nhpu hta rau kaleng taw nga nna
Job21:27 Nanhte ngai hpe myit maw ai hte
Job21:28 Nanhte gaw
Job21:29 Lam hkawm ai ni hpe n san yu myit ni? shanhte a sakse kumla n sawn yu myit ni?
Job21:30 N hkru ai wa gaw tsin-yam hkrum ai nhtoi a matu san da nga ai; sindawng kahtet ai nhtoi a matu
Job21:31 Shi galaw ai lam shi a man e kadai madun dan na rai ta? Shi galaw ai hte maren
Job21:32 Rai timung
Job21:33 Hkaraw a shingbut shi a ntsa e pyaw nga ai: shi a shawng e n dang hti ai ni galaw ai hte maren
Job21:34 Dai rai yang
Job22:1 Shaloi Teman masha Elihpa htan nna
Job22:2 hpaji rawng ai wa gaw
Job22:3 Nang dinghpring ai majaw
Job22:4 Hkrit hkungga ai myit rawng ai majaw
Job22:5 Nang galaw ai yubak kaba la nga ai
Job22:6 Nang gaw nhpu nnau a sut rai pagawn tang da shangun ndai; singgu krin re ai ni a hpun palawng nang hpyu la ndai.
Job22:7 Hki ba mat ai wa hpe lu na ntsin nang n jaw ndai; kawsi hkrum ai wa hpe shat n jaw hkraw ndai.
Job22:8 Lapyin ja ai wa mahtang lamu ga hpe up lu ai; shi a myi man pa ai ni dai yang e nga lu ma ai.
Job22:9 Gaida jan hpe nang kaman dat dat nna
Job22:10 Dai re ai majaw na a grup yin e mahkam up nga nna
Job22:11 Nsin sin mak nna
Job22:12 Karai Wa gaw sumsing lamu lahta tang e dung nga ai
Job22:13 Nang chyawm gaw
Job22:14 Sumwi ni shi hpe ka-up nna

Job22:17 Dai ni gaw Karai Wa hpe

Job22:22 Shi n-gup na sharin ai ga hkap la nna

Job35:1 Bai Elihu kahtap tsun ai gaw
Job35:2 “ngai gaw Karai Wa hta grau dinghpring nngai
Job35:3 Ngai yubak galaw tim’ maren akyu lu la na
Job35:4 Nang hte na a kanawn manang ni a ga hpe ngai htan kau na nngai.
Job35:5 Sumsing lamu de mada yu nna
Job35:6 Nang yubak galaw timung
Job35:7 Nang dinghpring timung
Job35:8 Nang galaw ai yubak nang zawn re ai wa hpe hkra nga ai; nang dinghpring ai rai yang
Job35:9 Zingri zingrat law law hkrum ai majaw
Job35:10 Rai timung
Job35:11 ntsa malem u ni hta anhte hpe hpaji grau jaw ya ai wa
Job35:12 Dai majaw shanhte jahtau timung
Job35:13 Gaja wa
Job35:14 Nang gaw
Job35:15 Ya chyawm gaw
Job35:16 Yoba gaw kaman lila ga tsun let n-gup hpaw nna
Job36:1 Bai Elihu kahtap tsun ai gaw
Job36:2 naw hkring u
Job36:3 Tsan tsan kaw na zai byeng-ya ngai shapraw nna
Job36:4 Gaja wa
Job36:5 Yu u
Job36:6 Shi gaw tara n lang ai ni a asak hpe
Job36:7 Shi gaw dinghpring ai ni hpe n yu nga ai
Job36:8 Bai
Job36:9 shi gaw
Job36:10 Sharin ai ga madat mayu hkra
Job36:11 Shanhte madat mara nna
Job36:12 Madat mara ai myit n rawng yang
Job36:13 N shawp ai myit rawng ai ni gaw
Job36:14 Asak kaji nga yang pyi
Job36:15 Shi gaw nni nkri hkrum ai ni hpe
Job36:16 Rai sa
Job36:17 Nang chyawm gaw tara n lang ai ni a dawdan ai hku hpring nga nna
Job36:18 Nang kahtet kamawt hkrum ai majaw
Job36:19 Nang hpyi jahtau ai hte n-gun lagaw ting dat ai majaw
Job36:20 Shana hpe hkum marit et; dai aten e amyu baw ni tinang shara na shapoi kau hkrum na mara ai.
Job36:21 Sadi u
Job36:22 Yu u
Job36:23 Shi sa wa ai lam
Job36:24 Shi a amu bungli hpe shagrau na
Job36:25 Masha ni yawng dai lam hpe azi yu masai; shinggyim masha ni tsan tsan kaw nna dai hpe mada yu ma ai.
Job36:26 Yu u
Job36:27 Shi gaw hka nsi ni hpe shalun la nhtawm
Job36:28 sumwi ni gaw dai hpe n taw n tsang
Job36:29 Gaja wa
Job36:30 Yu u
Job36:31 Dai lam hte masha amyu ni hpe shi dawdan nna
Job36:32 Shi gaw shi a lata yan hta myihprap lang nna
Job36:33 Shi a mu ngoi ai gaw shi a lam madun dan nga ai; yamnga ni pyi shi lung wa ai lam chye sawn ma ai.
Job37:1 Dai lam majaw nye a myit masin gari nna
Job37:2 Shi ngoi ai nsen kaba hte
Job37:3 Shi dai hpe sumsing lamu npu ting shabra dat nna
Job37:4 De a hpang e nsen ngoi nga ai: shi gaw shi a hpung shingkang nsen hte shaga nga ai; shi nsen ngoi yang
Job37:5 Karai Wa gaw shi a nsen hte mauhpa rai hkra ngoi nga ai; anhte n dang chye ai galu kaba ai amu galaw nga ai.
Job37:6 Shi gaw
Job37:7 Shi hpan da ai shinggyim masha yawng chye na lu mu ga
Job37:8 Dai shaloi e matse labye ni tinang a lungpu e shang nna
Job37:9 Dingda maga de nna nbung laru
Job37:10 Karai Wa kawut ai hte hka ge mat nna
Job37:11 Shi gaw htat ai sumwi ni hpe ntsin hte jahpring nna
Job37:12 Dai ni gaw shi a jaw e kayin hkawm wa nna
Job37:13 ari jaw na matu rai timung
Job37:14 Yoba e
Job37:15 Karai Wa gaw ndai amu ni hpe kaning rai hkang da nna
Job37:16 Hpaji hkum tsup ai Karai Wa mauhpa amu ngu ai
Job37:17 Dingda nbung majaw lamu ga sa-up wa nna
Job37:18 Jaw ai magri jamna zawn grin nga ai lamu madin hpe
Job37:19 Anhte shi hpe kaning nga tsun na
Job37:20 Ngai ga tsun mayu nngai
Job37:21 Ya chyawm gaw
Job37:22 Dingdung maga de na
Job37:23 Chyahtum chyalai n-gun rawng ai wa hpe anhte n sawk yu lu ga ai; n-gun atsam hte shi dan hkung nga ai; tara hku hkan ai hte dinghpring tsup nga ai majaw
Job37:24 Dai re ai majaw shinggyim masha ni shi hpe hkrit hkungga ma ai; tinang nan hpaji rawng dum ai wa hpe shi n yu ra nga ai law
Job38:1 Shaloi Yehowa gaw bungsha kaw nna Yoba hpe htan let
Job38:2 “hpaji daw ai lam hpe
Job38:3 Share wa zawn na nshang shingkyit kyit u; ngai san de ga
Job38:4 Ginding aga npawt hpe ngai gaw da yang
Job38:5 De a dingdung dingda kadai shadawn nga ai gaw
Job38:6 De a npawt nhpang ni hpa hta gaw da a ta? Nhtoi gintawng ni rau mahkawn mangoi nga nna
Job38:7 Karai Kasang a ali ama ni yawng kabu jahtau nga ma yang
Job38:8 Nammukdara gaw ga de nna kapaw pru wa yang
Job38:9 Da a hpun palawng gaw sumwi
Job38:10 de a matu lamu ga jarit tawn da nhtawm
Job38:11 “nang du hkra nang sa lu nna n lai lu ndai
Job38:12 Nang gaw
Job38:13 tara n lang ai ni hpe jahtaw kau lu hkra
Job38:14 De a majaw lamu ga gaw dazik tawk sai ga kagam hte bung nna arai yawng mayawng hpun palawng zawn dan leng wa ai.
Job38:15 Tara n lang ai ni a nhtoi hkoi mat wa nna
Job38:16 Nang gaw nammukdara hka hpawk ni hta shang yu nni? Sung htum ai htumpa e htinglet hkawm yu nni?
Job38:17 Si hkrung si htan chyinghka ni nang hpe madun a ni? Si ai shingnip de hprang ai lam nang mu yu nni?
Job38:18 Lamu ga dam lada ai hpe nang mada yu nit ni? Yawng mayawng hpe mu chye yang tsun u.
Job38:19 Nhtoi shanu nga ai shara de du ai lam gaw
Job38:20 Nang gaw
Job38:21 Gaja wa dai aten e nang mung shangai wa nna
Job38:22 Ahkyen rawng ai sutdek de nang shang yu nni? Ru tsang hkrum ai aten hte
Job38:23 majan hkrum ai shani matu
Job38:24 Nhtoi gaw kanang na galai wa nna
Job38:25 Masha n nga ai ga hte
Job38:26 hpang kara ai zaibru jang hpe madit nna
Job38:27 hka hpungla ni hkan lwi ai lam
Job38:28 Marang gaw kawa lu ai rai ni? Mari nsi ni hpe kadai shaprat a ta?
Job38:29 Ntsin shage gade a kan nna pru a ta? Sumsing lamu na ahkyen hpe
Job38:30 Ahka gaw nlung zawn gumdin mat nna makoi nga ai; sung ai hka hpung ni gaw ge mat ma ai.
Job38:31 Nang gaw kru majan hpe nhtan shabawn lu nni? Wala shingtau a shingkyit hpe raw kau lu nni?
Job38:32 Du hkra ladaw ni hpe nang shapraw lu nni? Nhtoi gintawng hte de a kasha ni hpe woi awn lu nni?
Job38:33 Sumsing lamu a htung tara nang chye nni? Nang dai hpe ga ntsa de up shangun lu nni?
Job38:34 Marang nhpawng ni nang hpe ka-up nga na matu
Job38:35 Myihprap ni hpe nang kala dat shangun lu nna
Job38:36 Hpaji byeng-ya hte kraw lawang hta kadai bang ya a ta? Myit masin hpe chye chyang ai nyan kadai jaw a ta?
Job38:37 Hpaji rawng nna sumwi ni hpe kadai hti lu a ta? Nhpu mawng gumdin nna
Job38:38 ga tawng ni ja ahkak mat yang
Job38:39 Nang gaw hkanghkyi kanu a matu shahpa tam lu nni? Hkanghkyi hkalung ni tinang a makoi shara e gawp nga nna
Job38:40 singwum npu e gyem yu nga yang
Job38:41 U hka hkalung ni shahpa n lu ai majaw
Job39:1 Ya ni gara aten e kasha hkrat ai
Job39:2 Dai ni gaw nhtoi shata gade umat rai nga ai hpe
Job39:3 Shanhte gaw gum let kasha hkrat kau nna
Job39:4 Hkalung ni mung kung wa nna
Job39:5 Nam lawze nhprang hpe
Job39:6 Layang prang ga hpe shi shanu nga ai nta ngai shatai nna
Job39:7 Mare a wu kadu ai nsen hpe shi hpa n nawn nna
Job39:8 Bum ga gaw shi a udat ginwang rai nga nna
Job39:9 Hpawlam gaw na a amu galaw nna
Job39:10 Nang shi hpe sumri hte na htai hta gyit lu nna
Job39:11 Shi n-gun ja ai majaw nang shi hpe kam nna
Job39:12 Na a mam hpe chyarang hta shinggyin la nna
Job39:13 U gawla-uk gaw singkaw kahprap nga ai: rai timung
Job39:14 N rai law
Job39:15 Masha gaw
Job39:16 Karai Wa gaw shi kaw na hpaji dawm la kau ai hte
Job39:17 shi gaw shi a hkalung ni hpe
Job39:18 Rai timung
Job39:19 Nang gaw laring gumra hpe n-gun jaw sa ni? Shi a du hta singgung mun nang tu shangun nni?
Job39:20 N-gam yaw zawn nang shi hpe gumtawng shangun nni? Shi a ladi sharat ai nsen gaw
Job39:21 Shi gaw kadit ga hpe lahkut nna
Job39:22 Hkrithpa hpe shi asawng nna
Job39:23 Pala ndum hte
Job39:24 N-yun bu nna pawt kahtet ai hte aga hpe shi gamaw kau nna
Job39:25 Pahtau galoi dum yang
Job39:26 Langji gaw na a hpaji hte singkaw kahpyen nna
Job39:27 Nang hkang da ai majaw langda gaw ntsa de pyen lung wa nna
Job39:28 Shi gaw lunghkrung ntsa e nga nga nna
Job39:29 Dai kaw nna tinang a shahpa hpe shi mada nga nna
Job39:30 Shi a hkalung ni mung sai lu ma ai: mang taw ai shara e shi nga nga ai
Job40:1 Bai Yehowa gaw Yoba hpe htan nna
Job40:2 baw law ai wa gaw chyahtum chyalai n-gun rawng ai wa hte dangrang hkat na mai a ni? Karai Wa hte ndang kalang hkat ai wa gaw htan yu u ga
Job40:3 Dai rai nna Yoba gaw Yehowa hpe htan nna
Job40:4 “yu u
Job40:5 Lang mi ngai tsun timung bai n htan gwi ni ai; lahkawng lang tsun timung
Job40:6 Shaloi Yehowa gaw bungsha kaw nna Yoba hpe htan let
Job40:7 “share wa zawn na nshang shingkyit kyit u; ngai san de ga
Job40:8 Nang gaja wa nye tara dara ai lam shabyak mayu nni? Nang dinghpring lu hkra
Job40:9 Na a lahpum Karai Wa a lahpum zawn rai nga a ni? Shi zawn mu ngoi ai nsen shapraw lu nni?
Job40:10 Hpung shingkang hte arawng sadang ya bu hpun u; daru magam hte hpung shingkang hpe mawn sumli u.
Job40:11 Na a pawt sindawng ai myit ru dat nna
Job40:12 Gumrawng ai ni hpe yu matsing nna shagrit kau mu; tara n lang ai ni hpe tinang a shara hkan kabye dip kau mu.
Job40:13 Shanhte hpe ga nhpu hta rau makoi kau mu; shanhte a myi man hpe nsin hta e ka-up da mu:
Job40:14 Dai rai yang she
Job40:15 Yu u
Job40:16 Shi a n-gun chyawm gaw shi a nshang e nga nga nna
Job40:17 Shi a nmai gaw marau hpun zawn kanga nga nna
Job40:18 Shi a nrut nra ni gaw
Job40:19 Karai Wa a hpan da mada hta shi nhtung nhka rai nga ai; shi hpe hpan da ai wa chyu sha
Job40:20 Gaja wa
Job40:21 Shi gaw mai-aw hte kungji tu ai hpung-ya hta dawngmu singwum npu e hpum nga ai.
Job40:22 Dai singwum ni gaw shi hpe shingnip ka-up nna
Job40:23 Yu mu
Job40:24 Shi maja nga yang
Job41:1 Nang gaw baren hpe nga myit hte lamat la lu nni? Shi a shinglet hpe sumri hte gyit shadau lu nni?
Job41:2 Shi a ladi hpe pali hte shoi lu nni? Shi a nnaw hpe sumprup hte shoi dinghkren na rai ni?
Job41:3 Shi nang hpe akroi anoi tawngban na rai ni? Ga ngwi ga sau nang hpe tsun na a ni?
Job41:4 Shi prat dingsa e na a mayam tai lu hkra
Job41:5 U hte ginsup ai zawn
Job41:6 Nga hkan ai ni gaw shi hpe hpya dut na ma ni? Hpaga ga ai ni gaw shi hpe shen karan na ma ni?
Job41:7 Shi a hpyi hpe ri chyinghkyi hte mung
Job41:8 Shi hpe sha hkra yu u; shi hkap gasat na lam dum u; htawm hpang e shi hpe gasat mayu sa na n rai.
Job41:9 Shi hpe gasat ai wa gaw hpa myit mada shara n nga ai; shi hpe mu yang pyi
Job41:10 Shi hpe jasu lu hkra
Job41:11 Ngai chyeju nhtang dum hkra
Job41:12 Shi a daw shan ni a lam
Job41:13 Shi a ntsa palawng hpe kadai gaw kau lu na
Job41:14 Shi a myi man chyinghka hpe kadai hpaw lu na rai ta? Shi a wa kawng grup grup hkrithpa rai nga ai.
Job41:15 Ngang ngang la da nna
Job41:16 Langai hte langai htep htep rai nga nna
Job41:17 Pa mi hte pa mi matut manoi rai nga nna
Job41:18 Shi kahti yang
Job41:19 Shi a n-gup hta na wan shanan grung pru nna
Job41:20 Shi ladi sharat yang
Job41:21 Shi a nsa sa ai gaw wan n-ga hpe shachyi lu nna
Job41:22 Shi a du krung e n-gun lapyin dung nga ai; shi shawng e hkrit kajawng ai gaw ka gumlawt nga ai.
Job41:23 Shi a shan pawm ni matut kahtap nga nna
Job41:24 Shi a myit masin gaw nlung hte maren ja nga ai; htumrin a kata nlung zawn ja nga lu ai.
Job41:25 Shi dawng pru yang
Job41:26 Nhtu kahtam yang nhtu hkam na n rai; ri
Job41:27 Shi gaw hpri hpe yi hku zawn
Job41:28 Ndan pala hte shi hpe jahtaw lu na n rai. Lahpaw pala nlung hpe yi hku zawn shatai nga ai.
Job41:29 Patbau hpe yi hku zawn shi nawn nna
Job41:30 Shi a kan hpyi
Job41:31 Shi gaw sung ai shara hpe
Job41:32 Shi lai wa ai lam hkang gaw tu ala nga ai rai nna
Job41:33 Lamu ga ntsa e shi hte shadawn lu ai wa n nga ai; hkrit kang ai myit n rawng hkra
Job41:34 Ntsa de na nga manga hte hpe shi mu yu nga ai; shi gaw matse labye ni yawng a ntsa e hkawhkam rai nga ai
Job42:1 Shaloi Yoba gaw Yehowa hpe htan nna
Job42:2 “nang gaw yawng mayawng hpe galaw lu nna
Job42:3 “Hpaji daw ai lam hpe myit n su ai hte shabyak ai wa gaw
Job42:4 Madat mara u law
Job42:5 Ngai gaw na a lam na hte na yu ni ai; ya chyawm gaw
Job42:6 Dai re ai majaw
Job42:7 Ya Yehowa gaw ndai ga Yoba hpe tsun ngut jang
Job42:8 Dai rai nna
Job42:9 Shing rai
Job42:10 Ya Yoba gaw shi a manang ni a matu tawngban nga yang
Job42:11 Shaloi shi a kahpu kanau ni
Job42:12 Shing rai Yehowa gaw Yoba hpe hpang jahtum e
Job42:13 Bai shi gaw shadang sha sanit hte shayi sha masum shaprat wu ai.
Job42:14 Shawng shangai ai shayi sha amying gaw Yemima
Job42:15 Yoba a shayi sha ni zawn hpraw tsawm ai numsha
Job42:16 Ya dai amu byin ai hpang
Job42:17 Dai hpang Yoba gaw dingla ugut gu nna
Psalms1:1 Tara n lang ai ni a bawng ai hku hta n hkawm
Psalms1:2 Yehowa a tara hta awng nga nna
Psalms1:3 Dai wa gaw hka kau e hkai ai
Psalms1:4 Tara n lang ai ni chyawm gaw
Psalms1:5 Dai majaw tara n lang ai ni
Psalms1:6 Kaning rai nme law
Psalms2:1 Masha amyu ni hpa majaw n-yun bu nga nna
Psalms2:2 Yehowa hte shi a Namman chya ai wa hpe
Psalms2:3 “Shan a hkang hkyihkyang anhte gang dut gaw
Psalms2:4 Lamu hta dung nga ai wa gaw mani nga ai
Psalms2:5 Dai shaloi
Psalms2:6 “Ngai gaw
Psalms2:7 Ga madat ngai shana ya na nngai: “Ngai sha nang rai nga ndai
Psalms2:8 Ngai e hpyi nna
Psalms2:9 Nang shanhte hpe hpri sumdoi hte shabya kau nna
Psalms2:10 Dai majaw hkawhkam ni e
Psalms2:11 Yehowa hpe hkungga lara ai hte daw mu
Psalms2:12 Dai kasha hpe pup mu: shing n rai yang
Psalms3:1 Yehowa e
Psalms3:2 “Karai Kasang hta shi a matu hkye la shara n nga ai
Psalms3:3 Yehowa e
Psalms3:4 Nye a nsen hte ngai Yehowa hpe shaga nga nna
Psalms3:5 Yehowa ngai hpe shadaw ya ni ai majaw
Psalms3:6 Ngai hpe grup grup kawan nga ma ai
Psalms3:7 Yehowa e
Psalms3:8 Yehowa gaw hkye hkrang la ai lam rai nga ai; Na amyu a ntsa e
Psalms4:1 Ngai hpe dinghpring shangun ai Karai Kasang e
Psalms4:2 Kaman lila tsaw nna
Psalms4:3 Yehowa gaw myit ding ai masha hpe shi a matu san da nu ai
Psalms4:4 Myit kahtet nga timung
Psalms4:5 Dinghpring ai hkungga nawng jau nna
Psalms4:6 “Kaja ai gaw anhte hpe kadai madun lu na a kun?” nga nna law law wa tsun ma ai. Yehowa e
Psalms4:7 Shanhte a mam hte tsabyi ngai ai aten e kabu gara ai hta
Psalms4:8 Ngwipyaw ai hte ngai kaleng taw nna yup nga nngai: Kaning rai nme law

Psalms5:2 Nye a Hkawhkam hte Karai Kasang e
Psalms5:3 Yehowa e
Psalms5:4 N tara ai hta awng nga ai Karai Wa
Psalms5:5 Gumrawng ai ni
Psalms5:6 Masu ga tsun ai ni hpe nang jahten kau nga ndai
Psalms5:7 Ngai chyawm gaw
Psalms5:8 Yehowa e
Psalms5:9 Shi a n-gup hta kamsham shara n rawng ai; Shanhte a kraw lawang n se nga malu ai; Shanhte a mayu hpaw nga ai lup rai nga malu ai
Psalms5:10 Karai Kasang e
Psalms5:11 Nang hpe shamyet shanat ai ni nlang kabu gara nga mu ga
Psalms5:12 Kaning rai nme law
Psalms6:1 Yehowa e
Psalms6:2 Yehowa e
Psalms6:3 Nye a myit masin nachying hkrit gari nga ai
Psalms6:4 Bai wa rit
Psalms6:5 Si ai hta kadai mung nang hpe dum nga ai n rai. Katsan ga hta nang hpe kadai chyeju jaw na ma ta?
Psalms6:6 Ngai madai nna hki ba la nga nngai; Shana shagu hkrap ai hte nye yup ku madi nga ai
Psalms6:7 Nye a myi yawn hkyen ai hte a mam nga ai; Nye a gumlau ni a majaw
Psalms6:8 Nye a hkrap ngu hkrap ngoi ai hpe Yehowa na wu ai majaw
Psalms6:9 Ngai shaga ai gaw
Psalms6:10 Nye a gumlau ni nlang kaya nna nachying hkrit gari ai hkrum na mara ai; Kaya kahpa hkrum let
Psalms7:1 Nye a Karai Wa Yehowa e
Psalms7:2 Hkrang la ai wa n nga yang
Psalms7:3 Nye a Karai Wa Yehowa e
Psalms7:4 Ngai hte hku ai wa hpe n kaja ai lam bai tai nna
Psalms7:5 Gumlau wa gaw nye a myit masin hpe hkan lep nna
Psalms7:6 Yehowa e
Psalms7:7 Masha hpawng amyu myu na a grup yin e jahpawng nhtawm
Psalms7:8 Yehowa gaw masha amyu ni hpe jeyang nga ai. Yehowa e
Psalms7:9 Tara n lang ai ni a n hkru ai lam sim mat malu ga; Dinghpring ai ni hpe mahtang shagrin mu. Dinghpring ai Karai Kasang gaw
Psalms7:10 Karai Kasang nye a n-gang lang ya nga ai; Myit malang ai ni a hkye la ai wa shi rai nga ai.
Psalms7:11 Karai Kasang gaw dingman ai tara agyi wa rai nga ai
Psalms7:12 Masha myit n kayin yang shi nhtu garang nna
Psalms7:13 Dai wa hpe shi a jasi ai arai ni shi shading nna
Psalms7:14 Yu mu
Psalms7:15 Shi nhkun chye htu da nna
Psalms7:16 Shi n hkru ai amu shi a baw hta bai wa lu ai. Shi a baw pungding hta shi a kashun kashe bai hkrat sa lu ai.
Psalms7:17 Ngai gaw Yehowa a dinghpring ai hte maren chyeju dum na nngai; Tsaw Htum ai Yehowa a amying hpe
Psalms8:1 Anhte a Madu Yehowa e
Psalms8:2 Nang hpe je hpre ai ni a majaw
Psalms8:3 Na a sumsing lamu gaw
Psalms8:4 Nang adum nga ai shinggyim masha hte
Psalms8:5 Nang shi hpe Karai Kasang hte loi mi sha shagrit da nna
Psalms8:6 Na a lata amu ntsa e
Psalms8:7 Nam e nga ai ashu ashan hpe mung
Psalms8:8 Nammukdara a lam e pyau hkawm ai yawng hte hpe mung
Psalms8:9 Anhte a Madu Yehowa e
Psalms9:1 Nye a myit mahkra hte
Psalms9:2 Na a majaw ngai kabu nna
Psalms9:3 Nye a gumlau ni kanut mat wa yang
Psalms9:4 Ngai hpang maga de nang tara dara nna dawdan ya nit dai; Dingman ai tara agyi nang rai nga ndai rai nna
Psalms9:5 Nang gaw masha amyu ni hpe daru kau nna
Psalms9:6 Gumlau ni mat mat wa nna
Psalms9:7 Yehowa chyawm gaw
Psalms9:8 Shi gaw mungkan ga hpe dingman ai hte tara dara nna
Psalms9:9 Yehowa gaw zingri zingrat hkrum ai ni a langchyi
Psalms9:10 Dai majaw
Psalms9:11 Ziun hta nga nga ai Yehowa hpe mahkawn mangoi mu; Amyu baw ni hpe shi a magam bungli shana ya mu.
Psalms9:12 Sai matai dawp ai wa gaw shanhte hpe dum nga nna
Psalms9:13 Yehowa e
Psalms9:14 shaloi na a akyu nlang hte gaw ngai gawn dan nna
Psalms9:15 Masha amyu ni
Psalms9:16 Yehowa shi hkum dan nga ai: tara dara ai amu galaw nu ai; Tara n lang ai ni gaw
Psalms9:17 Tara n lang ai ni hte
Psalms9:18 Matsan mayan ni hpe tut tut malap kau na mu ai n rai
Psalms9:19 Rawt u
Psalms9:20 O
Psalms10:1 Yehowa e
Psalms10:2 Tara n lang ai ni a gumrawng ai myit majaw
Psalms10:3 Tara n lang ai wa
Psalms10:4 Tara n lang ai wa myit kaba nna
Psalms10:5 Shi hkan ai hku
Psalms10:6 “Ngai galoi mung htawt mat ai hkrum na nngai n rai
Psalms10:7 Shi n-gup
Psalms10:8 Kahtawng ni a gyam yu ai shara hta e shi dung nga ai
Psalms10:9 Hkanghkyi gaw shi a lungpu hta zawn

Psalms73:1 Gaja wa
Psalms73:2 Ngai chyawm gaw
Psalms73:3 Tara n lang ai ni a ngamai ai lam mu mada yang
Psalms73:4 Shanhte tsin-yam tsindam
Psalms73:5 Masha gale zawn shanhte ru tsang ai n hkrum ma ai
Psalms73:6 Dai majaw gumrawng ai gaw shanhte a du hta gali da nna
Psalms73:7 Shanhte a myi hpum nna myi myi rai malu ai. Shanhte myit ai hku ladu lai nga malu ai.
Psalms73:8 Shanhte roi nna kashun kashe na lam tsun ma ai. Gumrawng gumtawng ga a tsun nga ma ai.
Psalms73:9 Shanhte a n-gup lamu hte nhtan shai nna

Ecclesiastes9:16 Shaloi ngai gaw ‘Hpaji byeng-ya gaw n-gun atsam hte grau kaja nga timung
Ecclesiastes9:17 Angawk ai ni hpe up ai wa a jahtau marawn ai ga hpe madat na hta
Ecclesiastes9:18 Hpaji byeng-ya gaw ri nhtu hte grau kaja nga ai: yubak kap ai wa langai mi mahtang mai kaja ai law law hpe jahten lu ai.

Isaiah46:1 Bela gaw gum dagup nga ai. Nebo gaw agrawp mat sai! De a sumla ni gaw matse labye ni hte yamnga ni a ntsa e mara nga ma ai: nanhte hpai hkawm ai arai ni gaw hki ba ai yamnga ni a matu lit tai wa sai.

Isaiah65:2 Tinang myit ra ai hte maren
Isaiah65:3 dai amyu gaw sun hkan e hkungga nawng nna
Isaiah65:4 shanhte gaw lupwa hkan e sa dung nna
Isaiah65:5 bai shanhte gaw
Isaiah65:6 “Yu mu
Isaiah65:7 gaja wa
Isaiah65:8 Bai Yehowa ning nga ai
Isaiah65:9 Ngai gaw Yaku a dap hta na nli
Isaiah65:10 Ngai hpe tam ai
Isaiah65:11 Yehowa hpe kau da nna
Isaiah65:12 nanhte a Auba gaw nhtu rai nga nna
Isaiah65:13 Dai re ai majaw Madu Yehowa gaw
Isaiah65:14 yu mu
Isaiah65:15 Nanhte gaw tinang a mying hpe
Isaiah65:16 shing rai
Isaiah65:17 Kaning rai nme law
Isaiah65:18 Ngai hpan da ai lam hta nanhte tutnawng kabu gara sharawng awng nga mu: kaning rai nme law
Isaiah65:19 Ngai gaw Yerusalem mare hta kabu gara nga nna
Isaiah65:20 “Dai mare hta ma chyangai e si na n rai
Isaiah65:21 Shanhte gaw tinang galaw ai nta hta shanu nga nna
Isaiah65:22 Shanhte nta galaw nna
Isaiah65:23 Shanhte gaw be be kaman sha amu galaw na n rai; shamyit kau hkrum na matu kasha shaprat na n rai: shanhte gaw Yehowa kaw na shaman lu la ai nli rai nga nna
Isaiah65:24 Shanhte garai n shaga yang

Isaiah66:1 Yehowa gaw ning nga ai: Sumsing lamu gaw nye a tingnyang

Isaiah66:4 Ngai mung

Isaiah66:6 Mare de na wu kadu ai nsen
Isaiah66:7 Ziun shayi sha gaw

Isaiah66:9 “Kasha shaprat na lam ngai shabyin nna

Obadiah1:1 Obedia a shingran ga. Madu Yehowa gaw Edom mung hpe lakap nna ning nga tsun ai: Yehowa kaw na shiga anhte na saga ai; maigan amyu ni hpang de kasa mung shangun dat nu ai. Shi gaw
Obadiah1:2 Yu u
Obadiah1:3 Lungpu hta rawng nna
Obadiah1:4 Langda hte maren nang tsaw nga nna
Obadiah1:5 Lagu lagut ni nang kaw shang nna

Colossians1:1 Karai Kasang myit ra ai a majaw Hkristu Yesu a kasa rai nga ai
Colossians1:2 Anhte a Wa Karai Kasang kaw na
Colossians1:3 Sumsing lamu hta e nanhte a matu mara mahkawng da ai myit mada ai a marang e
Colossians1:4 nanhte a matu tutnawng e akyu hpyi nga yang
Colossians1:5 dai myit mada ai a lam nanhte kaw du dep ai tengman ai kabu gara shiga a majaw
Colossians1:6 Dai kabu gara shiga gaw
Colossians1:7 Dai gaw anhte a tsawra ai shingdep shingtau wa Epahpra kaw nna nanhte sharin la manit dai hte maren rai nga ai; shi gaw Hkristu hta e anhte a matu mara kangka re ai bungli gun hpai ai wa rai nga ai rai nna
Colossians1:8 dai Wenyi hta e nanhte a tsawra ai myit gaw
Colossians1:9 Dai re ai majaw
Colossians1:10 Karai Kasang a chye chyang ai lam hta asi si nna
Colossians1:11 shi a hpung shingkang re ai n-gun nga ai hte maren
Colossians1:12 nhtoi hta rawng nga ai chyoi pra ai ni a sali wunli a daw mi dagraw lu myit ga
Colossians1:13 Dai Kawa gaw
Colossians1:14 dai Kasha hte nan htingrai htingrat na lam hte yubak raw dat na akyu anhte lu la sagaw ai.
Colossians1:15 Shi gaw myi e n mu lu ai Karai Kasang a hkrang bung sumla rai nga ai hte
Colossians1:16 Kaning rai nme law
Colossians1:17 Shi gaw yawng mayawng a shawng na rai nga ai hte
Colossians1:18 Dai Hpung ngu ai hkumhkrang a baw
Colossians1:19 Kaning rai nme law
Colossians1:20 shi a wudang na hkaw ai asai hte mahku mara shatai let
Colossians1:21 Nanhte mung shawng e tsasam re ai hte
Colossians1:22 dai makam masham hta nga nga nna
Colossians1:23 shi a si hkam ai a marang e
Colossians1:24 Ya chyawm gaw nanhte a matu mara ngai hkrum ai tsin-yam tsindam hta ngai kabu nga ai hte
Colossians1:25 Moi chyaloi nhkoi prat mi hte prat mi makoi magap da ai sung htum ai lam ngu ai Karai Kasang a mungga hpe jahkum shatsup nga u ga.
Colossians1:26 Karai Kasang gaw nanhte a matu mara ngai hpe jaw da ai aya hte maren
Colossians1:27 Dai sung htum ai lam chyawm gaw
Colossians1:28 Masha shagu hte hpe Hkristu a man e hkum tsup ai hte jashawn lu u ga
Colossians1:29 Shing rai byin lu hkra
Colossians2:1 Kaning rai nme law
Colossians2:2 shanhte a kraw lawang shangwi shapyaw ai hkrum lu mu ga
Colossians2:3 Hkristu hta e chyawm gaw hpaji byeng-ya hte chye chyang ai lam ngu ai sutgan yawng mayawng kyem da nga ai.
Colossians2:4 Kadai wa rai timung
Colossians2:5 Kaning rai nme law
Colossians2:6 Dai re ai majaw
Colossians2:7 shi hta e ru jung nna gaw da nga ai hte
Colossians2:8 Hkristu a hkang ai tara hte n bung ai
Colossians2:9 kaning rai nme law
Colossians2:10 Shi hta e mung nanhte hkum tsup nga myit dai; shi gaw du aya lu ai hte ahkang aya lu ai ni yawng mayawng a baw rai nga ai.
Colossians2:11 Hkristu a matu gadoi hkam ai ngu ai
Colossians2:12 baptisma hkam ai lam hta nanhte shi hte rau lup wa nna
Colossians2:13 Nanhte gaw tara tawt lai nna
Colossians2:14 Anhte a shut hpyit ai yawng mayawng hte hpe shi raw dat kau ya nna
Colossians2:15 Du aya hte ahkang aya lu ai hte hpe htawk jahkrat kau nhtawm
Colossians2:16 Dai re ai majaw
Colossians2:17 dai hte gaw du na ra ai lam a shingna hkrai rai nga ai; dai hkumhkrang chyawm gaw
Colossians2:18 Myit shagyip ngu na lam tam nna
Colossians2:19 dai baw hta nna
Colossians2:20 Ya
Colossians2:21 Hkum jum
Colossians2:22 dai yawng hte gaw asung shang nna
Colossians2:23 Shing nga ai ga gaw
Colossians3:1 Dai rai nna
Colossians3:2 Ga ntsa arai ni hpe myit hkum manoi myit; ntsa na arai ni hpe myit manoi nga mu.
Colossians3:3 Kaning rai nme law
Colossians3:4 Anhte a asak ngu ai Hkristu gaw dan pru wa ai shaloi e
Colossians3:5 Dai re ai majaw
Colossians3:6 dai hte a majaw Karai Kasang a pawt sindawng ai gaw du ra ai.
Colossians3:7 Dai hte hta nanhte shawng e naw hkrung nga ai shaloi e dai hta e nanhte hkawm nga myit dai.
Colossians3:8 Ya chyawm gaw ndai nlang hte hte
Colossians3:9 Shada da masu magaw ga hkum tsun myit: kaning rai nme law
Colossians3:10 hpan tawn da ai wa a hkrang bung sumla hte maren rai nga ai chye chyang ai lam hta ningnan tai wa ai gawng shing-yan ningnan hpe nanhte dagraw nga myit dai:
Colossians3:11 dai gawng shing-yan ningnan hta
Colossians3:12 Dai re ai majaw
Colossians3:13 shada da hkam mana ai hte
Colossians3:14 Dai nlang hte a ntsa e hkum tsup re ai makyit sumri ngu ai tsawra ai myit hpe kahtap hpun nga mu.
Colossians3:15 Nanhte a myit masin hta e mung
Colossians3:16 Hkristu a mungga gaw hpaji byeng-ya amyu myu hte nanhte hta n taw n tsang ashanu nga u ga: shakawn kungdawn ga
Colossians3:17 Nanhte hpa lam galaw myit yang
Colossians3:18 Numsha ni e
Colossians3:19 La ni e
Colossians3:20 Ma ni e
Colossians3:21 Kanu kawa ni e
Colossians3:22 Mayam ni e
Colossians3:23 Dai madu a lata na
Colossians3:24 dai Madu a matu zawn galaw nga nna
Colossians3:25 N ding n man ai hku galaw ai wa gaw
Colossians4:1 Madu ni e
Colossians4:2 Akyu hpyi ai hta shakut sharang rai nga mu
Colossians4:3 Hkristu a sung htum ai ga a majaw ngai gyit hkang da ai hkrum rai timung
Colossians4:4 dai sung htum ai ga shadan dan na ngai mai tsun ai hte maren
Colossians4:5 Shinggan de nga ai ni a man e hpaji byeng-ya hte hkawm nga nna
Colossians4:6 Langai hte langai hpe kaning rai htan lu na chye lu u ga
Colossians4:7 Dai Madu hta e tsawra ai hpunau wa hte kangka re ai shingdep shingtau hte kanawn mayam rai nga ai Tuhkiku gaw
Colossians4:8 nanhte gaw anhte a lam chye lu nna
Colossians4:9 Dai hta kaga
Colossians4:10 Nye a bawng dung manang Aristaku nanhte hpe shakram dat myit dai; Barnaba a kahkri Marku mung nanhte hpe shakram dat myit dai: shi a lam htet da ai ga hpe nanhte hkam la lu myit dai rai nna
Colossians4:11 Yustu mying ai Yesu mung nanhte hpe shakram dat myit dai: shanhte gaw matu gadoi hkam ai ni hte seng ma ai rai nna
Colossians4:12 Nanhte kaw na rai nga ai Hkristu Yesu a mayam Epahpra gaw nanhte hpe shakram dat myit dai: nanhte gaw Karai Kasang a myit mang ai hku nlang hte hta hkum tsup ai hte dinggrin nga let lahpran tsap nga lu myit ga
Colossians4:13 Kaning rai nme law
Colossians4:14 Tsawra ai tsi sara Luka yan Dema gaw nanhte hpe shakram dat myit dai.
Colossians4:15 Ladoki e nga ai hpunau ni hte
Colossians4:16 Ndai shagun dat ai laika hpe nanhte hti ngut jang
Colossians4:17 Arhkipo hpe mung
Colossians4:18 Ngai Pawlu nan nye a lata hte ndai shakram ai ga ka dat nngai. Nye a hkang hkyihkyang hpe dum nga mu. Chyeju gaw nanhte hte rau anga nga u ga law.

1Timothy1:1 Anhte a Hkye hkrang la ai Madu Karai Kasang hte
1Timothy1:2 Kawa Karai Kasang hte anhte a Madu Hkristu Yesu kaw na chyeju
1Timothy1:3 Sharin shaga ai lam kaga n sharin la lu mu ga mung
1Timothy1:4 ga law ga la shapraw ai maumwi ga hte n htum hkraw ai ahtik labau gawn ai hku hpe n hkan shachyut mu ga she
1Timothy1:5 Dai daru jet kau ai ga a chyahtum chyawm gaw
1Timothy1:6 Dai lam hta na nkau mi gaw yit mat wa nna
1Timothy1:7 shanhte gaw tara sara tai mayu ma timung
1Timothy1:8 Marai langai ngai jep ai tara hpe sun ang ai hku sung nga a yang gaw
1Timothy1:9 rai timung
1Timothy1:10 hpye ai amu galaw ai ni
1Timothy1:11 dai gaw ngai hkam la ai a rawng ai Karai Kasang a hpung shingkang madun ai kabu gara shiga hte maren rai nga ai.
1Timothy1:12 Ngai hpe kangka re ai wa nawn nna
1Timothy1:13 Ngai chyawm gaw
1Timothy1:14 Hkristu Yesu hte seng ai makam masham hte tsawra ai hte hpawn
1Timothy1:15 Yubak kap ai ni hpe hkye hkrang la na matu mara
1Timothy1:16 Dai yubak kap ai ni hta ngai mahtang yubak kaba htum ai wa rai nga nngai rai timung
1Timothy1:17 Ya
1Timothy1:18 Ngai sha
1Timothy1:19 Dai lam hte hpe nkau mi shinggan kau nna
1Timothy1:20 Shanhte hta Humeni yan Alesandru lawm ma ai rai nna
1Timothy2:1 Dai re ai majaw tara hkungga nna sun ang ai lam amyu myu hpe hkan galaw lu let
1Timothy2:2 hkawhkam ni hte ahkang aya lu ai ni mahkra a matu mara mung
1Timothy2:3 Dai gaw anhte a hkye hkrang la ai Madu Karai Kasang a man e mai kaja ai hte sharawng awng ai lam rai nga ai:
1Timothy2:4 masha yawng mayawng hkye hkrang la ai hkrum lu nna
1Timothy2:5 Kaning rai nme law
1Timothy2:6 Shi gaw yawng mayawng a matu mara shi hkum nan hpe gawng malai hkungga di nna ap kau nu ai: ahkying aten du jang she de a sakse pru na ra ai.
1Timothy2:7 Dai sakse hkam ai hta
1Timothy2:8 Dai re ai majaw
1Timothy2:9 Numsha ni mung dai hte maren
1Timothy2:10 Karai Kasang hpe nawku ai numsha ni a mai ang ai hte maren

1Timothy2:12 Numsha gaw sharin shaga nga na hte
1Timothy2:13 Kaning rai nme law
1Timothy2:14 Adam chyawm gaw hkalem hkalau ai n hkrum ai sha
1Timothy2:15 Rai timung

1Timothy3:4 tinang nta hpe atsawm sha up hkang nga nna
1Timothy3:5 Marai langai ngai tinang a nta hpe n chye hkang a yang gaw
1Timothy3:6 Gumrawng ai myit rawng nna
1Timothy3:7 Shatan nhkan n hkrum nna

1Timothy3:9 dai makam masham a sung htum ai lam hpe
1Timothy3:10 Shanhte gaw shawng e chyam dinglik yu ai hkam nna
1Timothy3:11 Dai hte maren numsha ni mung
1Timothy3:12 Hpungtau wa mung num langai sha lu nna
1Timothy3:13 Kaning rai nme law
1Timothy3:14 Nang kaw gade n na yang du na
1Timothy3:15 Karai Kasang a nta e kaning rai arawn alai hkan mai na nang chye lu n ga
1Timothy3:16 Karai Kasang hpe nawku hkungga ai lam a sung htum ai gaw
1Timothy4:1 Rai timung
1Timothy4:2 hkalem hkalau chye ai wenyi ni hte nat a sharin shaga ai lam hpe madat mara na rai nna
1Timothy4:3 Wenyi e dan dan leng leng tsun dan nga ai: shanhte gaw hkungran ai lam hpe mung
1Timothy4:4 Karai Kasang hpan tawn da ai ashu ashan nga manga chyawm gaw
1Timothy4:5 Karai Kasang a mungga hte akyu hpyi ai a gawp e shachyoi shapra nga ai majaw
1Timothy4:6 Ndai lam hte gaw nang hpunau ni hpe shadum jahprang nga n yang gaw
1Timothy4:7 N san n seng ai hte gumgai maumwi ga hpe yeng kau u; tara hkungga ai hku hta na hkum shan hpe shakung jahpan nga u:
1Timothy4:8 kaning rai nme law
1Timothy4:9 Dai mungga gaw tengman ai hte gaja wa hkam la ging ai ga rai nga ai;
1Timothy4:10 dai rai nna
1Timothy4:11 Ndai lam hte hpe hkang da nna sharin shaga nga u.
1Timothy4:12 Na a brang ram prat e
1Timothy4:13 Ngai sa du ai du hkra laika hti yu nna shadum jahprang ai hte sharin shaga ai hta
1Timothy4:14 Hpung salang ni a lata mara da let
1Timothy4:15 Na a kunghpan wa ai nyan masha mahkra a man e dan leng wa u ga
1Timothy4:16 Na a hkum hpe mung
1Timothy5:1 Hpung salang wa hpe hkum daru kau u
1Timothy5:2 hpawmi ni hpe kanu zawn
1Timothy5:3 Gaida jan majing rai nga ai gaida jan ni hpe
1Timothy5:4 Gaida jan langai ngai kasha
1Timothy5:5 Gaida jan majing ngu ai lik lik rai nga ai gaida jan gaw
1Timothy5:6 Tangpyaw sha tam nga ai gaida jan chyawm gaw
1Timothy5:7 Shanhte gaw mara n kap mu ga
1Timothy5:8 Marai langai ngai tinang hte seng ai ni hpe n bau ai hta n-ga
1Timothy5:9 Kru shi ning garai n du ai gaida jan gaw
1Timothy5:10 kaja ai bungli galaw yu ai rai nna gumhkawng nga ai jan; kashu kasha hpe lanu lahku yu ai; manam daw yu ai
1Timothy5:11 Dai hta aprat kaji ai gaida jan ni hpe shinggan kau mu: shanhte gaw Hkristu a lam n hkam sharang lu ai shaloi e
1Timothy5:12 shawng na ga shaka hpe kau da ma ai majaw
1Timothy5:13 Dai hta kaga
1Timothy5:14 Dai rai nna
1Timothy5:15 kaning rai nme law
1Timothy5:16 Kamsham ai numsha langai ngai kaw gaida jan nga a yang gaw
1Timothy5:17 Atsawm sha up nga ai Hpung salang ni hpe hkungga lara shagup na ging nga ai hta
1Timothy5:18 Kaning rai nme law
1Timothy5:19 Sakse lahkawng masum n nga a yang gaw
1Timothy5:20 Shaje ni gaw hkrit kang nga mu ga
1Timothy5:21 Ndai lam hte hpe myi man n tau ai hte hpa lachyen lahka n re ai sha nang galaw nga n ga
1Timothy5:22 Kadai wa a ntsa e mung lata alawan hkum mara ya u; masha kaga a yubak hta hkum bawk lawm nga u: tinang dai san seng nga u.
1Timothy5:23 Na a kan akyu byin lu na hte
1Timothy5:24 Masha nkau mi a yubak gaw dan leng nga ai rai nna
1Timothy5:25 Dai hte maren dan leng nga ai mai kaja ai amu bungli mung nga nga ai rai nna
1Timothy6:1 Karai Kasang a mying nsang hte dai sharin shaga ai lam gaw shatan nhkan n hkrum u ga

Hebrews11:1 Makam masham ngu ai gaw
Hebrews11:2 de a majaw mung
Hebrews11:3 Nga yawng nga pra gaw Karai Kasang a mungga hte hpajang tawn da nga ai rai nna
Hebrews11:4 Kamsham ai hte Abela gaw Ka-in hta grau kaja ai hkungga Karai Kasang hpe nawng ya wu ai rai nna
Hebrews11:5 Kamsham ai a majaw Enuk gaw si hkrung si htan n hkrum lu hkra
Hebrews11:6 makam masham n rawng yang gaw
Hebrews11:7 Kamsham ai hte Noa gaw garai n mu yu ai arai ni a lam shadum jahprang ai hkam la lu ai rai nna
Hebrews11:8 Abraham gaw
Hebrews11:9 Ga ndat hte seng ai mung hta e
Hebrews11:10 kaning rai nme law

Hebrews11:12 Dai re ai majaw
Hebrews11:13 Ndai ni nlang hte gaw
Hebrews11:14 Shing rai yin la ai ni gaw
Hebrews11:15 Shanhte pru kau da ai buga hpe nan
Hebrews11:16 Ya chyawm gaw
Hebrews11:17 Abraham gaw chyam yu hkrum ai shaloi
Hebrews11:18 nga nna ga ndat ni hpe hkap hkam la ai wa gaw
Hebrews11:19 shing di nawng kau timung
Hebrews11:20 Kamsham ai hte Isak mung
Hebrews11:21 Kamsham ai hte Yaku gaw

Hebrews11:23 Mawshe hpe shangai ngut yang
Hebrews11:24 Mawshe gaw kaba wa jang
Hebrews11:25 tawng marang mi yubak a pyaw daw kadaw na hte

Hebrews11:28 Kasha alat ni hpe sat kau ai wa

Hebrews11:37 shanhte gaw
Hebrews11:38 nam mali hkan e

Hebrews12:1 Ya ndai hte wa law la ai sakse ni gaw
Hebrews12:2 dai madu gaw
Hebrews12:3 Nanhte a myit masin gawng run ai hte hki ba ai n hkrum malit ga
Hebrews12:4 Nanhte gaw yubak hpe katut gasat na matu asai pru hkra garai n hkap daw yu myit dai:
Hebrews12:5 dai hta kaga
Hebrews12:6 Madu gaw tsawra ai wa hpe sharin ga ai
Hebrews12:7 Daru sharin ya ai akyu lu la na matu
Hebrews12:8 Yawng mayawng hkam ga ai daru sharin la ai nanhte n hkrum myit yang gaw
Hebrews12:9 Bai lam mi gaw
Hebrews12:10 Shanhte gaw tinang ra ai hku hte maren tawng marang mi sha daru sharin ya lu mi ai; shi chyawm gaw
Hebrews12:11 Daru sharin ya ai lam magup gaw hkam sha ai shaloi e

Hebrews12:22 Nanhte chyawm gaw

Hebrews13:3 Sharen rau hkrum ai ni zawn
Hebrews13:4 Hkungran ai lam gaw
Hebrews13:5 Gumhpraw marin ai lam hkum hkan myit; nanhte lu ai made hte myit dik nga mu: kaning rai nme law

Hebrews13:8 Yesu Hkristu gaw

Hebrews13:17 Nanhte a lam woi ningshawng ni a ga madat mara nna

1John1:2 Dai asak gaw dan pru wa ai rai nna
